60#ifndef WITH_AUTOMATION_TESTS
61 #define WITH_AUTOMATION_TESTS (WITH_DEV_AUTOMATION_TESTS || WITH_PERF_AUTOMATION_TESTS)
62#endif
63
65#define SAFE_GETSTACK(VariableName, IgnoreCount, MaxDepth) \
66 TArray<FProgramCounterSymbolInfo> VariableName = FPlatformStackWalk::GetStack(IgnoreCount, MaxDepth); \
67 if (VariableName.Num() == 0) \
68 { \
69 /* This is a rare failure that can occur in some circumstances */ \
70 FProgramCounterSymbolInfo& Info = VariableName.Emplace_GetRef(); \
71 TCString<ANSICHAR>::Strncpy(Info.Filename, "Unknown", FProgramCounterSymbolInfo::MAX_NAME_LENGTH); \
72 Info.LineNumber = 1; \
73 }
74
75// This macro allows for early exit of the executing unit test function when the condition is false
76// It explicitly uses the condition to ensure static analysis is happy with nullptr checks
77#ifndef UE_RETURN_ON_ERROR
78#define UE_RETURN_ON_ERROR(Condition, Message) const bool PREPROCESSOR_JOIN(UE____bCondition_Line_, __LINE__) = (Condition); AddErrorIfFalse(PREPROCESSOR_JOIN(UE____bCondition_Line_, __LINE__), (Message)); if(!PREPROCESSOR_JOIN(UE____bCondition_Line_, __LINE__)) return false
79#endif
80
85enum class EAutomationTestFlags
86{
87 None = 0x00000000,
88 //~ Application context required for the test
89 // Test is suitable for running within the editor
90 EditorContext = 0x00000001,
91 // Test is suitable for running within the client
92 ClientContext = 0x00000002,
93 // Test is suitable for running within the server
94 ServerContext = 0x00000004,
95 // Test is suitable for running within a commandlet
96 CommandletContext = 0x00000008,
97 // Test is suitable for running within program application (not editor, nor game)
98 ProgramContext = 0x00000010,
99
100 //~ Features required for the test - not specifying means it is valid for any feature combination
101 // Test requires a non-null RHI to run correctly
102 NonNullRHI = 0x00000100,
103 // Test requires a user instigated session
104 RequiresUser = 0x00000200,
105
106 //~ One-off flag to allow for fast disabling of tests without commenting code out
107 // Temp disabled and never returns for a filter
108 Disabled = 0x00010000,
109
110 //~ Priority of the test
111 // The highest priority possible. Showstopper/blocker.
112 CriticalPriority = 0x00100000,
113 // High priority. Major feature functionality etc.
114 HighPriority = 0x00200000,
115 // Medium Priority. Minor feature functionality, major generic content issues.
116 MediumPriority = 0x00400000,
117 // Low Priority. Minor content bugs. String errors. Etc.
118 LowPriority = 0x00800000,
119
120 //~ Speed of the test
121 //Super Fast Filter
122 SmokeFilter = 0x01000000,
123 //Engine Level Test
124 EngineFilter = 0x02000000,
125 //Product Level Test
126 ProductFilter = 0x04000000,
127 //Performance Test
128 PerfFilter = 0x08000000,
129 //Stress Test
130 StressFilter = 0x10000000,
131 //Negative Test. For tests whose correct expected outcome is failure.
132 NegativeFilter = 0x20000000,
133};
134
135ENUM_CLASS_FLAGS(EAutomationTestFlags)
136
137inline constexpr EAutomationTestFlags EAutomationTestFlags_ApplicationContextMask = EAutomationTestFlags::EditorContext | EAutomationTestFlags::ClientContext | EAutomationTestFlags::ServerContext | EAutomationTestFlags::CommandletContext | EAutomationTestFlags::ProgramContext;
138inline constexpr EAutomationTestFlags EAutomationTestFlags_FeatureMask = EAutomationTestFlags::NonNullRHI | EAutomationTestFlags::RequiresUser;
139inline constexpr EAutomationTestFlags EAutomationTestFlags_HighPriorityAndAbove = EAutomationTestFlags::CriticalPriority | EAutomationTestFlags::HighPriority;
140inline constexpr EAutomationTestFlags EAutomationTestFlags_MediumPriorityAndAbove = EAutomationTestFlags::CriticalPriority | EAutomationTestFlags::HighPriority | EAutomationTestFlags::MediumPriority;
141inline constexpr EAutomationTestFlags EAutomationTestFlags_PriorityMask = EAutomationTestFlags::CriticalPriority | EAutomationTestFlags::HighPriority | EAutomationTestFlags::MediumPriority | EAutomationTestFlags::LowPriority;
142inline constexpr EAutomationTestFlags EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask = EAutomationTestFlags::SmokeFilter | EAutomationTestFlags::EngineFilter | EAutomationTestFlags::ProductFilter | EAutomationTestFlags::PerfFilter | EAutomationTestFlags::StressFilter | EAutomationTestFlags::NegativeFilter;
143
144CORE_API const TMap<FString, EAutomationTestFlags>& EAutomationTestFlags_GetTestFlagsMap();
145
147namespace EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags
148{
149 enum MatchType
150 {
151 // When matching expected messages, do so exactly.
152 Exact,
153 // When matching expected messages, just see if the message string is contained in the string to be evaluated.
154 Contains,
155 };
156
157 inline const TCHAR* ToString(EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::MatchType ThisType)
158 {
159 switch (ThisType)
160 {
161 case Contains:
162 return TEXT("Contains");
163 case Exact:
164 return TEXT("Exact");
165 }
166 return TEXT("Unknown");
167 }
168}
169
171namespace EAutomationExpectedErrorFlags = EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags;
172

181 , Measurement(InMeasurement)
182 , Context(InContext)

184 }
185};

188class FAutomationTestExecutionInfo
189{
190public:
192 FAutomationTestExecutionInfo()
193 : bSuccessful( false )
194 , Duration(0.0)
195 , Errors(0)
196 , Warnings(0)
197 {}
198
200 ~FAutomationTestExecutionInfo()
201 {
202 Clear();
203 }
204
206 CORE_API void Clear();
207
208 CORE_API int32 RemoveAllEvents(EAutomationEventType EventType);
209
210 CORE_API int32 RemoveAllEvents(TFunctionRef<bool(FAutomationEvent&)> FilterPredicate);
211
213 const TArray<FAutomationExecutionEntry>& GetEntries() const { return Entries; }
214
215 CORE_API void AddEvent(const FAutomationEvent& Event, int StackOffset = 0, bool bCaptureStack = true);
216
217 CORE_API void AddWarning(const FString& WarningMessage);
218 CORE_API void AddError(const FString& ErrorMessage);
219
220 int32 GetWarningTotal() const { return Warnings; }
221 int32 GetErrorTotal() const { return Errors; }
222
223 const FString& GetContext() const
224 {
225 static FString EmptyContext;
226 return ContextStack.Num() ? ContextStack.Top() : EmptyContext;
227 }
228
229 void PushContext(const FString& Context)
230 {
231 ContextStack.Push(Context);
232 }
233
234 void PopContext()
235 {
236 if ( ContextStack.Num() > 0 )
237 {
238 ContextStack.Pop();
239 }
240 }
241
242public:
243
245 bool bSuccessful;
246
248 TArray<FString> AnalyticsItems;
249
251 TArray<FAutomationTelemetryData> TelemetryItems;
252
254 FString TelemetryStorage;
255
257 double Duration;
258
259private:
261 TArray<FAutomationExecutionEntry> Entries;
262
263 int32 Errors;
264 int32 Warnings;
265
266 TArray<FString> ContextStack;
267};
268
270class FAutomationTestInfo
271{
272public:
273
274 // Default constructor
275 FAutomationTestInfo() = default;
276
292 FAutomationTestInfo(const FString& InDisplayName, const FString& InFullTestPath, const FString& InTestName, const EAutomationTestFlags InTestFlags, const int32 InNumParticipantsRequired, const FString& InParameterName = FString(), const FString& InSourceFile = FString(), int32 InSourceFileLine = 0, const FString& InAssetPath = FString(), const FString& InOpenCommand = FString(), const FString& InTestTags = FString())
293 : DisplayName( InDisplayName )
294 , FullTestPath( InFullTestPath )
295 , TestName( InTestName )
296 , TestTags( InTestTags )
297 , TestParameter( InParameterName )
298 , SourceFile( InSourceFile )
299 , SourceFileLine( InSourceFileLine )
300 , AssetPath( InAssetPath )
301 , OpenCommand( InOpenCommand )
302 , TestFlags( InTestFlags )
303 , NumParticipantsRequired( InNumParticipantsRequired )
304 , NumDevicesCurrentlyRunningTest( 0 )
305 {
306 }
307
308public:
309
315 void AddTestFlags( const EAutomationTestFlags InTestFlags)
316 {
317 TestFlags |= InTestFlags;
318 }
319
325 const FString& GetDisplayName() const
326 {
327 return DisplayName;
328 }
329
335 const FString& GetFullTestPath() const
336 {
337 return FullTestPath;
338 }
339
345 FString GetTestName() const
346 {
347 return TestName;
348 }
349
355 FString GetTestTags() const
356 {
357 return TestTags;
358 }
359
365 const FString GetTestParameter() const
366 {
367 return TestParameter;
368 }
369
375 const FString GetSourceFile() const
376 {
377 return SourceFile;
378 }
379
385 const int32 GetSourceFileLine() const
386 {
387 return SourceFileLine;
388 }
389
395 const FString GetAssetPath() const
396 {
397 return AssetPath;
398 }
399
405 const FString GetOpenCommand() const
406 {
407 return OpenCommand;
408 }
409
415 const EAutomationTestFlags GetTestFlags() const
416 {
417 return TestFlags;
418 }
419
423 void ResetNumDevicesRunningTest()
424 {
425 NumDevicesCurrentlyRunningTest = 0;
426 }
427
431 void InformOfNewDeviceRunningTest()
432 {
433 NumDevicesCurrentlyRunningTest++;
434 }
435
441 const int GetNumDevicesRunningTest() const
442 {
443 return NumDevicesCurrentlyRunningTest;
444 }
445
451 const int32 GetNumParticipantsRequired() const
452 {
453 return NumParticipantsRequired;
454 }
455
456
462 void SetDisplayName( const FString& InDisplayName )
463 {
464 DisplayName = InDisplayName;
465 }
466
472 void SetNumParticipantsRequired( int32 NumRequired )
473 {
474 NumParticipantsRequired = NumRequired;
475 }
476
477private:
479 FString DisplayName;
480
481 FString FullTestPath;
482
484 FString TestName;
485
487 FString TestTags;
488
490 FString TestParameter;
491
493 FString SourceFile;
494
496 int32 SourceFileLine;
497
499 FString AssetPath;
500
502 FString OpenCommand;
503
505 EAutomationTestFlags TestFlags = EAutomationTestFlags::None;
506
508 uint32 NumParticipantsRequired = 0;
509
511 uint32 NumDevicesCurrentlyRunningTest = 0;
512};

514
518class IAutomationLatentCommand : public TSharedFromThis<IAutomationLatentCommand>
519{
520public:
521 /* virtual destructor */
522 virtual ~IAutomationLatentCommand() {};
523
527 virtual bool Update() = 0;
528
529private:
533 bool InternalUpdate()
534 {
535 if (StartTime == 0.0)
536 {
537 StartTime = FPlatformTime::Seconds();
538 }
539
540 return Update();
541 }
542
543protected:
545 IAutomationLatentCommand()
546 : StartTime(0.0f)
547 {
548 }
549
550 // Gets current run time for the command for reporting purposes.
551 double GetCurrentRunTime() const
552 {
553 if (StartTime == 0.0)
554 {
555 return 0.0;
556 }
557
558 return FPlatformTime::Seconds() - StartTime;
559 }
560
562 double StartTime;
563
564 friend class FAutomationTestFramework;
565};
566
570class FThreadedAutomationLatentCommand : public IAutomationLatentCommand
571{
572public:
573
574 virtual ~FThreadedAutomationLatentCommand() {};
575
576 virtual bool Update() override
577 {
578 if (!Future.IsValid())
579 {
580 Future = Async(EAsyncExecution::Thread, MoveTemp(Function));
581 }
582
583 return Future.IsReady();
584 }
585
586 FThreadedAutomationLatentCommand(TUniqueFunction<void()> InFunction)
587 : Function(MoveTemp(InFunction))
588 { }
589
590protected:
591
592 TUniqueFunction<void()> Function;
593
594 TFuture<void> Future;
595
596 friend class FAutomationTestFramework;
597};
598
599
603class IAutomationNetworkCommand : public TSharedFromThis<IAutomationNetworkCommand>
604{
605public:
606 /* virtual destructor */
607 virtual ~IAutomationNetworkCommand() {};
608
614 virtual uint32 GetRoleIndex() const = 0;
615
617 virtual void Run() = 0;
618};
619
620struct FAutomationExpectedMessage
621{
622 // Original string pattern matching expected log message.
623 // If IsRegex is false, it is this string that is used to match.
624 // Otherwise MessagePatternRegex is set to a valid pointer of FRegexPattern.
625 // The base pattern string is preserved none the less to allow checks for duplicate entries.
626 FString MessagePatternString;
627 // Regular expression pattern from MessagePatternString if regex option was true(default), otherwise it is not set.
628 TOptional<FRegexPattern> MessagePatternRegex;
629 // Type of comparison to perform on error log using MessagePattern.
630 EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::MatchType CompareType;
636 int32 ExpectedNumberOfOccurrences;
637 int32 ActualNumberOfOccurrences;
638 // Log message Verbosity
639 ELogVerbosity::Type Verbosity;
640
644 FAutomationExpectedMessage(FString& InMessagePattern, ELogVerbosity::Type InVerbosity, EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::MatchType InCompareType, int32 InExpectedNumberOfOccurrences = 1, bool IsRegex = true)
645 : MessagePatternString(InMessagePattern)
646 , CompareType(InCompareType)
647 , ExpectedNumberOfOccurrences(InExpectedNumberOfOccurrences)
648 , ActualNumberOfOccurrences(0)
649 , Verbosity(InVerbosity)
650 {
651 if (IsRegex)
652 {
653 MessagePatternRegex = FRegexPattern((InCompareType == EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::Exact) ? FString::Printf(TEXT("^%s$"), *InMessagePattern) : InMessagePattern, ERegexPatternFlags::CaseInsensitive);
654 }
655 }
656
657 FAutomationExpectedMessage(FString& InMessagePattern, ELogVerbosity::Type InVerbosity, int32 InExpectedNumberOfOccurrences)
658 : MessagePatternString(InMessagePattern)
659 , MessagePatternRegex(FRegexPattern(InMessagePattern, ERegexPatternFlags::CaseInsensitive))
660 , CompareType(EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::Contains)
661 , ExpectedNumberOfOccurrences(InExpectedNumberOfOccurrences)
662 , ActualNumberOfOccurrences(0)
663 , Verbosity(InVerbosity)
664 {}
665
666 inline bool IsRegex() const
667 {
668 return MessagePatternRegex.IsSet();
669 }
670
671 inline bool IsExactCompareType() const
672 {
673 return CompareType == EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::Exact;
674 }
675
681 bool Matches(const FString& Message)
682 {
683 bool HasMatch = false;
684 if (IsRegex())
685 {
686 FRegexMatcher MessageMatcher(MessagePatternRegex.GetValue(), Message);
687 HasMatch = MessageMatcher.FindNext();
688 }
689 else
690 {
691 HasMatch = Message.Contains(MessagePatternString) && (!IsExactCompareType() || Message.Len() == MessagePatternString.Len());
692 }
693 ActualNumberOfOccurrences += HasMatch;
694 return HasMatch;
695 }
696
697 bool operator==(const FAutomationExpectedMessage& Other) const
698 {
699 return MessagePatternString == Other.MessagePatternString;
700 }
701
702 bool operator<(const FAutomationExpectedMessage& Other) const
703 {
704 return MessagePatternString < Other.MessagePatternString;
705 }
706
707};
708
709FORCEINLINE uint32 GetTypeHash(const FAutomationExpectedMessage& Object)
710{
711 return GetTypeHash(Object.MessagePatternString);
712}
713
714struct FAutomationScreenshotData
715{
716 FString ScreenShotName;
717 FString VariantName;
718 FString Context;
719 FString TestName;
720 FString Notes;
721
722 FGuid Id;
723 FString Commit;
724
725 int32 Width;
726 int32 Height;
727
728 // RHI Details
729 FString Platform;
730 FString Rhi;
731 FString FeatureLevel;
732 bool bIsStereo;
733
734 // Hardware Details
735 FString Vendor;
736 FString AdapterName;
737 FString AdapterInternalDriverVersion;
738 FString AdapterUserDriverVersion;
739 FString UniqueDeviceId;
740
741 // Quality Levels
742 float ResolutionQuality;
743 int32 ViewDistanceQuality;
744 int32 AntiAliasingQuality;
745 int32 ShadowQuality;
746 int32 GlobalIlluminationQuality;
747 int32 ReflectionQuality;
748 int32 PostProcessQuality;
749 int32 TextureQuality;
750 int32 EffectsQuality;
751 int32 FoliageQuality;
752 int32 ShadingQuality;
753
754 // Comparison Requests
755 bool bHasComparisonRules;
756 uint8 ToleranceRed;
757 uint8 ToleranceGreen;
758 uint8 ToleranceBlue;
759 uint8 ToleranceAlpha;
760 uint8 ToleranceMinBrightness;
761 uint8 ToleranceMaxBrightness;
762 float MaximumLocalError;
763 float MaximumGlobalError;
764 bool bIgnoreAntiAliasing;
765 bool bIgnoreColors;
766
767 // Path of the screenshot generated from AutomationCommon::GetScreenShotPath()
768 FString ScreenshotPath;
769
770 FAutomationScreenshotData()
771 : Id()
772 , Commit()
773 , Width(0)
774 , Height(0)
775 , bIsStereo(false)
776 , ResolutionQuality(1.0f)
777 , ViewDistanceQuality(0)
778 , AntiAliasingQuality(0)
779 , ShadowQuality(0)
780 , GlobalIlluminationQuality(0)
781 , ReflectionQuality(0)
782 , PostProcessQuality(0)
783 , TextureQuality(0)
784 , EffectsQuality(0)
785 , FoliageQuality(0)
786 , ShadingQuality(0)
787 , bHasComparisonRules(false)
788 , ToleranceRed(0)
789 , ToleranceGreen(0)
790 , ToleranceBlue(0)
791 , ToleranceAlpha(0)
792 , ToleranceMinBrightness(0)
793 , ToleranceMaxBrightness(255)
794 , MaximumLocalError(0.0f)
795 , MaximumGlobalError(0.0f)
796 , bIgnoreAntiAliasing(false)
797 , bIgnoreColors(false)
798 {
799 }
800};
801
802struct FAutomationScreenshotCompareResults
803{
804 FGuid UniqueId;
805 FString ErrorMessage;
806 double MaxLocalDifference = 0.0;
807 double GlobalDifference = 0.0;
808 bool bWasNew = false;
809 bool bWasSimilar = false;
810 FString IncomingFilePath;
811 FString ReportComparisonFilePath;
812 FString ReportApprovedFilePath;
813 FString ReportIncomingFilePath;
814 FString ScreenshotPath;
815
816 FAutomationScreenshotCompareResults()
817 : UniqueId()
818 , MaxLocalDifference(0.0)
819 , GlobalDifference(0.0)
820 , bWasNew(false)
821 , bWasSimilar(false)
822 { }
823
824 FAutomationScreenshotCompareResults(
825 FGuid InUniqueId,
826 FString InErrorMessage,
827 double InMaxLocalDifference,
828 double InGlobalDifference,
829 bool InWasNew,
830 bool InWasSimilar,
831 FString InIncomingFilePath,
832 FString InReportComparisonFilePath,
833 FString InReportApprovedFilePath,
834 FString InReportIncomingFilePath,
835 FString InScreenshotPath
836 )
837 : UniqueId(InUniqueId)
838 , ErrorMessage(InErrorMessage)
839 , MaxLocalDifference(InMaxLocalDifference)
840 , GlobalDifference(InGlobalDifference)
841 , bWasNew(InWasNew)
842 , bWasSimilar(InWasSimilar)
843 , IncomingFilePath(InIncomingFilePath)
844 , ReportComparisonFilePath(InReportComparisonFilePath)
845 , ReportApprovedFilePath(InReportApprovedFilePath)
846 , ReportIncomingFilePath(InReportIncomingFilePath)
847 , ScreenshotPath(InScreenshotPath)
848 { }
849
850 CORE_API FAutomationEvent ToAutomationEvent() const;
851};
852
853enum class EAutomationComparisonToleranceLevel : uint8
854{
855 Zero,
856 Low,
857 Medium,
858 High
859};
860
861struct FAutomationComparisonToleranceAmount
862{
863public:
864
865 FAutomationComparisonToleranceAmount()
866 : Red(0)
867 , Green(0)
868 , Blue(0)
869 , Alpha(0)
870 , MinBrightness(0)
871 , MaxBrightness(255)
872 {
873 }
874
875 FAutomationComparisonToleranceAmount(uint8 R, uint8 G, uint8 B, uint8 A, uint8 InMinBrightness, uint8 InMaxBrightness)
876 : Red(R)
877 , Green(G)
878 , Blue(B)
879 , Alpha(A)
880 , MinBrightness(InMinBrightness)
881 , MaxBrightness(InMaxBrightness)
882 {
883 }
884
885 static FAutomationComparisonToleranceAmount FromToleranceLevel(EAutomationComparisonToleranceLevel InTolerance)
886 {
887 switch (InTolerance)
888 {
889 case EAutomationComparisonToleranceLevel::Low:
890 return FAutomationComparisonToleranceAmount(16, 16, 16, 16, 16, 240);
891 case EAutomationComparisonToleranceLevel::Medium:
892 return FAutomationComparisonToleranceAmount(24, 24, 24, 24, 24, 220);
893 case EAutomationComparisonToleranceLevel::High:
894 return FAutomationComparisonToleranceAmount(32, 32, 32, 32, 64, 96);
895 }
896 // Zero
897 return FAutomationComparisonToleranceAmount(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 255);
898 }
899
900 uint8 Red;
901 uint8 Green;
902 uint8 Blue;
903 uint8 Alpha;
904 uint8 MinBrightness;
905 uint8 MaxBrightness;
906};
907

1003 CORE_API bool RegisterAutomationTest( const FString& InTestNameToRegister, FAutomationTestBase* InTestToRegister );
1004
1010 CORE_API bool UnregisterAutomationTest( const FString& InTestNameToUnregister );
1011

1022
1031 CORE_API bool UnregisterAutomationTestTags(const FString& InTestNameToUnregister);
1032

1043
1051 CORE_API FString GetTagsForAutomationTest(const FString& InTestName);
1052
1058 CORE_API void EnqueueLatentCommand(TSharedPtr<IAutomationLatentCommand> NewCommand);
1059
1065 CORE_API void EnqueueNetworkCommand(TSharedPtr<IAutomationNetworkCommand> NewCommand);
1066
1074 CORE_API bool ContainsTest( const FString& InTestName ) const;
1075
1081 CORE_API bool RunSmokeTests();
1082
1086 CORE_API void ResetTests();
1087
1095 CORE_API void StartTestByName( const FString& InTestToRun, const int32 InRoleIndex, const FString& InFullTestPath = FString() );
1096
1102 CORE_API bool StopTest( FAutomationTestExecutionInfo& OutExecutionInfo );
1103
1109 CORE_API bool ExecuteLatentCommands();
1110
1116 CORE_API bool ExecuteNetworkCommands();
1117
1121 CORE_API void DequeueAllCommands();
1122
1126 bool IsLatentCommandQueueEmpty() const
1127 {
1128 return LatentCommands.IsEmpty();
1129 }
1130
1134 CORE_API void LoadTestModules();
1135
1142 CORE_API void GetValidTestNames( TArray<FAutomationTestInfo>& TestInfo ) const;
1143
1153 CORE_API void GetTestFullNamesMatchingTagPattern(TArray<FString>& OutTestNames, const FString& TagPattern) const;

1161
1165 CORE_API void SetDeveloperDirectoryIncluded(const bool bInDeveloperDirectoryIncluded);
1166
1170 CORE_API void SetRequestedTestFilter(const EAutomationTestFlags InRequestedTestFlags);
1171
1172
1176 CORE_API FOnTestScreenshotCaptured& OnScreenshotCaptured();
1177
1181 CORE_API FOnTestScreenshotAndTraceCaptured& OnScreenshotAndTraceCaptured();
1182
1186 void SetForceSmokeTests(const bool bInForceSmokeTests)
1187 {
1188 bForceSmokeTests = bInForceSmokeTests;
1189 }
1190
1191 bool GetCaptureStack() const
1192 {
1193 return bCaptureStack && !NeedSkipStackWalk();
1194 }
1195
1200 void SetCaptureStack(bool bCapture)
1201 {
1202 bCaptureStack = bCapture;
1203 }
1204
1210 CORE_API void AddAnalyticsItemToCurrentTest( const FString& AnalyticsItem );
1211
1215 FAutomationTestBase* GetCurrentTest() const
1216 {
1217 return CurrentTest;
1218 }
1219
1223 FString GetCurrentTestFullPath() const
1224 {
1225 return CurrentTestFullPath;
1226 }
1227
1231 static CORE_API bool NeedSkipStackWalk();
1232
1236 static CORE_API bool NeedLogBPTestMetadata();
1237
1241 static CORE_API bool NeedPerformStereoTestVariants();
1242
1246 static CORE_API bool NeedUseLightweightStereoTestVariants();
1247
1251 CORE_API void NotifyScreenshotComparisonComplete(const FAutomationScreenshotCompareResults& CompareResults);
1252
1256 CORE_API void NotifyScreenshotComparisonReport(const FAutomationScreenshotCompareResults& CompareResults);
1257
1258 CORE_API void NotifyTestDataRetrieved(bool bWasNew, const FString& JsonData);
1259 CORE_API void NotifyPerformanceDataRetrieved(bool bSuccess, const FString& ErrorMessage);
1260
1261 CORE_API void NotifyScreenshotTakenAndCompared();
1262
1272 CORE_API bool CanRunTestInEnvironment(const FString& InTestToRun, FString* OutReason, bool* OutWarn) const;
1273
1274private:
1275
1277 class FAutomationTestOutputDevice : public FOutputDevice
1278 {
1279 public:
1280 FAutomationTestOutputDevice()
1281 : CurTest( nullptr ) {}
1282
1283 ~FAutomationTestOutputDevice()
1284 {
1285 CurTest = nullptr;
1286 }
1287
1294 virtual void Serialize( const TCHAR* V, ELogVerbosity::Type Verbosity, const class FName& Category ) override;
1295
1301 virtual bool CanBeUsedOnMultipleThreads() const override
1302 {
1303 return true;
1304 }
1305
1312 void SetCurrentAutomationTest( FAutomationTestBase* InAutomationTest )
1313 {
1314 CurTest = InAutomationTest;
1315 }
1316
1317 private:
1319 std::atomic<FAutomationTestBase*>CurTest;
1320 };
1321
1323 class FAutomationTestMessageFilter: public FFeedbackContext
1324 {
1325 public:
1326 FAutomationTestMessageFilter()
1327 : CurTest(nullptr)
1328 , DestinationContext(nullptr) {}
1329
1330 ~FAutomationTestMessageFilter()
1331 {
1332 DestinationContext = nullptr;
1333 CurTest = nullptr;
1334 }
1335
1342 virtual void Serialize(const TCHAR* V, ELogVerbosity::Type Verbosity, const FName& Category) override;
1343 virtual void Serialize(const TCHAR* V, ELogVerbosity::Type Verbosity, const FName& Category, double Time) override;
1344
1345 virtual void SerializeRecord(const UE::FLogRecord& Record) override;
1346
1352 virtual bool CanBeUsedOnMultipleThreads() const override
1353 {
1354 return true;
1355 }
1356
1364 void SetCurrentAutomationTest(FAutomationTestBase* InAutomationTest)
1365 {
1366 CurTest = InAutomationTest;
1367 }
1368
1375 void SetDestinationContext(FFeedbackContext* InDestinationContext)
1376 {
1377 DestinationContext = InDestinationContext;
1378 }
1379
1380 private:
1381 std::atomic<FAutomationTestBase*> CurTest;
1382 std::atomic<FFeedbackContext*> DestinationContext;
1383 FCriticalSection ActionCS;
1384 };
1385
1386 friend class FAutomationTestOutputDevice;

1389
1391 CORE_API void ConcludeAutomationTests();
1392
1399 CORE_API void DumpAutomationTestExecutionInfo( const TMap<FString, FAutomationTestExecutionInfo>& InInfoToDump );
1400

1408
1415 CORE_API bool InternalStopTest(FAutomationTestExecutionInfo& OutExecutionInfo);
1416
1418 CORE_API FAutomationTestFramework();
1419
1421 CORE_API ~FAutomationTestFramework();
1422
1423 // Copy constructor and assignment operator intentionally left unimplemented
1424 CORE_API FAutomationTestFramework( const FAutomationTestFramework& );
1425 CORE_API FAutomationTestFramework& operator=( const FAutomationTestFramework& );
1426
1428 FAutomationTestOutputDevice AutomationTestOutputDevice;
1429
1431 FAutomationTestMessageFilter AutomationTestMessageFilter;
1432
1433 FFeedbackContext* OriginalGWarn = nullptr;
1434
1436 TMap<FString, FAutomationTestBase*> AutomationTestClassNameToInstanceMap;
1437
1439 TMap<FString, FString> TestFullNameToTagDataMap;
1440
1442 TQueue< TSharedPtr<IAutomationLatentCommand> > LatentCommands;
1443
1445 TQueue< TSharedPtr<IAutomationNetworkCommand> > NetworkCommands;
1446
1448 EAutomationTestFlags RequestedTestFilter;
1449
1451 double StartTime;
1452
1454 bool bTestSuccessful;
1455
1457 FAutomationTestBase* CurrentTest;
1458
1460 FString Parameters;
1461
1463 FString CurrentTestFullPath;
1464
1466 bool bDeveloperDirectoryIncluded;
1467
1469 uint32 NetworkRoleIndex;
1470
1472 FOnTestScreenshotCaptured TestScreenshotCapturedDelegate;
1473
1475 FOnTestScreenshotAndTraceCaptured TestScreenshotAndTraceCapturedDelegate;
1476
1478 bool bForceSmokeTests;
1479
1480 bool bCaptureStack;
1481
1482 TMap<FString, FOnTestSectionEvent> OnEnteringTestSectionEvent;
1483 TMap<FString, FOnTestSectionEvent> OnLeavingTestSectionEvent;
1484
1492 bool TagsMatchPattern(const FString& Tags, const FString& TagPattern) const;
1493
1495 TSharedPtr<FTextFilterExpressionEvaluator> TagFilter;
1496};
1497
1499class FAutomationTestTags
1500{
1501public:
1509 FAutomationTestTags(const FString& InTestFullName, const FString& InTags)
1510 {
1511 LLM_SCOPE_BYNAME(TEXT("AutomationTest/Framework"));
1512 TestFullName = InTestFullName;
1513 bool Registered = FAutomationTestFramework::Get().RegisterAutomationTestTags( InTestFullName, InTags );
1514 if (!Registered)
1515 {
1516 UE_LOG(LogAutomationTestFramework, Warning, TEXT("Tag registration already exists for test '%s', existing value was not overridden"), *TestFullName);
1517 }
1518 }
1519
1523 FAutomationTestTags() {}
1524
1525 ~FAutomationTestTags()
1526 {
1527 if (!TestFullName.IsEmpty())
1528 {
1529 //ignore failure to unregister due to already being unregistered
1530 FAutomationTestFramework::Get().UnregisterAutomationTestTags(TestFullName);
1531 }
1532 }
1533private:
1534 FString TestFullName;
1535};
1536
1538class FAutomationTestBase
1539{
1540public:
1546 CORE_API FAutomationTestBase( const FString& InName, const bool bInComplexTask );
1547
1549 CORE_API virtual ~FAutomationTestBase() ;
1550
1552 static CORE_API bool bSuppressLogWarnings;
1553 static CORE_API bool bSuppressLogErrors;
1554 static CORE_API bool bElevateLogWarningsToErrors;
1555 static CORE_API TArray<FString> SuppressedLogCategories;
1556
1562 virtual EAutomationTestFlags GetTestFlags() const = 0;
1563
1565 FString GetTestName() const { return TestName; }
1566
1568 FString GetTestContext() const { return TestParameterContext; }
1569
1573 virtual FString GetBeautifiedTestName() const = 0;
1574
1578 virtual FString GetTestFullName() const {
1579 if (FAutomationTestFramework::Get().GetCurrentTest() == this)
1580 {
1581 return FAutomationTestFramework::Get().GetCurrentTestFullPath();
1582 }
1583 if (GetTestContext().IsEmpty()) { return GetBeautifiedTestName(); }
1584 return FString::Printf(TEXT("%s.%s"), *GetBeautifiedTestName(), *GetTestContext());
1585 }
1586
1592 virtual uint32 GetRequiredDeviceNum() const = 0;
1593
1595 CORE_API void ClearExecutionInfo();
1596
1602 CORE_API virtual void AddError( const FString& InError, int32 StackOffset = 0 );
1603
1611 CORE_API virtual bool AddErrorIfFalse( bool bCondition, const FString& InError, int32 StackOffset = 0 );
1612
1620 UE_DEPRECATED(5.4, "Please use AddError instead.")
1621 CORE_API virtual void AddErrorS(const FString& InError, const FString& InFilename, int32 InLineNumber);
1622
1630 UE_DEPRECATED(5.4, "Please use AddWarning instead.")
1631 CORE_API virtual void AddWarningS(const FString& InWarning, const FString& InFilename, int32 InLineNumber);
1632
1638 CORE_API virtual void AddWarning( const FString& InWarning, int32 StackOffset = 0);
1639
1645 CORE_API virtual void AddInfo( const FString& InLogItem, int32 StackOffset = 0, bool bCaptureStack = false);
1646
1652 CORE_API virtual void AddEvent(const FAutomationEvent& InEvent, int32 StackOffset = 0, bool bCaptureStack = false);
1653
1659 CORE_API virtual void AddAnalyticsItem(const FString& InAnalyticsItem);
1660
1668 CORE_API virtual void AddTelemetryData(const FString& DataPoint, double Measurement, const FString& Context = TEXT(""));
1669
1676 CORE_API virtual void AddTelemetryData(const TMap<FString, double>& ValuePairs, const FString& Context = TEXT(""));
1677
1683 CORE_API virtual void SetTelemetryStorage(const FString& StorageName);
1684
1690 CORE_API bool HasAnyErrors() const;
1691
1697 CORE_API bool HasMetExpectedMessages(ELogVerbosity::Type VerbosityType = ELogVerbosity::All);
1698
1704 CORE_API bool HasMetExpectedErrors();
1705
1709 CORE_API bool GetLastExecutionSuccessState();
1710
1717 CORE_API void GetExecutionInfo( FAutomationTestExecutionInfo& OutInfo ) const;
1718
1722 CORE_API void GenerateTestNames( TArray<FAutomationTestInfo>& TestInfo ) const;
1723
1727 static CORE_API bool LogCategoryMatchesSeverityInclusive(ELogVerbosity::Type Actual, ELogVerbosity::Type MaximumVerbosity);
1728
1732 static CORE_API void LoadDefaultLogSettings();
1746 CORE_API void AddExpectedMessage(FString ExpectedPatternString, ELogVerbosity::Type ExpectedVerbosity, EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::MatchType CompareType = EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::Contains, int32 Occurrences = 1, bool IsRegex = true);
1747
1760 CORE_API void AddExpectedMessagePlain(FString ExpectedString, ELogVerbosity::Type ExpectedVerbosity, EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::MatchType CompareType = EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::Contains, int32 Occurrences = 1);
1761
1773 CORE_API void AddExpectedMessage(FString ExpectedPatternString, EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::MatchType CompareType = EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::Contains, int32 Occurrences = 1, bool IsRegex = true);
1774
1785 CORE_API void AddExpectedMessagePlain(FString ExpectedString, EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::MatchType CompareType = EAutomationExpectedMessageFlags::Contains, int32 Occurrences = 1);
1786
1787
1796 CORE_API void GetExpectedMessages(TArray<FAutomationExpectedMessage>& OutInfo, ELogVerbosity::Type Verbosity = ELogVerbosity::All) const;
1797
1805 CORE_API void GetExpectedMessages(TArray<FAutomationExpectedMessage>& OutInfo, bool IncludeSuppressed, ELogVerbosity::Type Verbosity = ELogVerbosity::All) const;
1806
1818 CORE_API void AddExpectedError(FString ExpectedPatternString, EAutomationExpectedErrorFlags::MatchType CompareType = EAutomationExpectedErrorFlags::Contains, int32 Occurrences = 1, bool IsRegex = true);
1819
1830 CORE_API void AddExpectedErrorPlain(FString ExpectedString, EAutomationExpectedErrorFlags::MatchType CompareType = EAutomationExpectedErrorFlags::Contains, int32 Occurrences = 1);
1831
1837 const bool IsComplexTask() const
1838 {
1839 return bComplexTask;
1840 }
1841
1842 const bool IsRanOnSeparateThread() const
1843 {
1844 return bRunOnSeparateThread;
1845 }
1846
1852 virtual bool SuppressLogs()
1853 {
1854 return bSuppressLogs;
1855 }
1856
1864 virtual bool ShouldCaptureLogCategory(const class FName& Category) const { return true; }
1865
1871 virtual bool SuppressLogErrors() { return bSuppressLogErrors; }
1872
1878 virtual bool SuppressLogWarnings() { return bSuppressLogWarnings; }
1879
1885 virtual bool ElevateLogWarningsToErrors() { return bElevateLogWarningsToErrors; }
1886
1890 virtual TArray<FString> GetSuppressedLogCategories() { return SuppressedLogCategories; }
1891
1892
1896 FORCEINLINE void AddCommand(IAutomationLatentCommand* NewCommand)
1897 {
1898 TSharedRef<IAutomationLatentCommand> CommandPtr = MakeShareable(NewCommand);
1899 FAutomationTestFramework::Get().EnqueueLatentCommand(CommandPtr);
1900 }
1901
1905 FORCEINLINE void AddCommand(IAutomationNetworkCommand* NewCommand)
1906 {
1907 TSharedRef<IAutomationNetworkCommand> CommandPtr = MakeShareable(NewCommand);
1908 FAutomationTestFramework::Get().EnqueueNetworkCommand(CommandPtr);
1909 }
1910
1912 virtual FString GetTestSourceFileName() const { return TEXT(""); }
1913
1915 virtual int32 GetTestSourceFileLine() const { return 0; }
1916
1918 virtual FString GetTestSourceFileName(const FString& InTestName) const { return GetTestSourceFileName(); }
1919
1921 virtual int32 GetTestSourceFileLine(const FString& InTestName) const { return GetTestSourceFileLine(); }
1922
1924 virtual FString GetTestAssetPath(const FString& Parameter) const { return TEXT(""); }
1925
1927 virtual FString GetTestOpenCommand(const FString& Parameter) const { return TEXT(""); }
1928
1929 void PushContext(const FString& Context)
1930 {
1931 ExecutionInfo.PushContext(Context);
1932 }
1933
1934 void PopContext()
1935 {
1936 ExecutionInfo.PopContext();
1937 }
1938
1940 virtual bool CanRunInEnvironment(const FString& TestParams, FString* OutReason, bool* OutWarn) const
1941 {
1942 // By default the test is able to run in the current environment
1943 // It is responsibility of a child class to decide if the flow should skip the corresponding test.
1944 return true;
1945 }
1946
1947public:
1948
1949 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const int32 Actual, const int32 Expected);
1950 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const int64 Actual, const int64 Expected);
1951#if PLATFORM_64BITS
1952 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const SIZE_T Actual, const SIZE_T Expected);
1953#endif
1954 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const float Actual, const float Expected, float Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER);
1955 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const double Actual, const double Expected, double Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER);
1956 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const FVector Actual, const FVector Expected, float Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER);
1957 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const FTransform Actual, const FTransform Expected, float Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER);
1958 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const FRotator Actual, const FRotator Expected, float Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER);
1959 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const FColor Actual, const FColor Expected);
1960 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const FLinearColor Actual, const FLinearColor Expected);
1961 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const TCHAR* Actual, const TCHAR* Expected);
1962 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, FStringView Actual, FStringView Expected);
1963 bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const FString& Actual, const FString& Expected)
1964 {
1965 return TestEqual(What, *Actual, *Expected);
1966 }
1967 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, FUtf8StringView Actual, FUtf8StringView Expected);
1968 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const FText Actual, const FText Expected);
1969 CORE_API bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const FName Actual, const FName Expected);
1970 CORE_API bool TestNotEqual(const TCHAR* What, const TCHAR* Actual, const TCHAR* Expected);
1971 CORE_API bool TestNotEqual(const TCHAR* What, FStringView Actual, FStringView Expected);
1972 bool TestNotEqual(const TCHAR* What, const FString& Actual, const FString& Expected)
1973 {
1974 return TestNotEqual(What, *Actual, *Expected);
1975 }
1976 CORE_API bool TestNotEqual(const TCHAR* What, FUtf8StringView Actual, FUtf8StringView Expected);
1977 CORE_API bool TestNotEqual(const TCHAR* What, const FText Actual, const FText Expected);
1978 CORE_API bool TestNotEqual(const TCHAR* What, const FName Actual, const FName Expected);
1979
1980 UE_DEPRECATED(5.5, "Use TestEqual instead (string tests are case insensitive by default)")
1981 CORE_API bool TestEqualInsensitive(const TCHAR* What, const TCHAR* Actual, const TCHAR* Expected);
1982 UE_DEPRECATED(5.5, "Use TestEqual instead (string tests are case insensitive by default)")
1983 CORE_API bool TestEqualInsensitive(const TCHAR* What, FStringView Actual, FStringView Expected);
1984 UE_DEPRECATED(5.5, "Use TestEqual instead (string tests are case insensitive by default)")
1985 CORE_API bool TestEqualInsensitive(const TCHAR* What, FUtf8StringView Actual, FUtf8StringView Expected);
1986 UE_DEPRECATED(5.5, "Use TestNotEqual instead (string tests are case insensitive by default)")
1987 CORE_API bool TestNotEqualInsensitive(const TCHAR* What, const TCHAR* Actual, const TCHAR* Expected);
1988 UE_DEPRECATED(5.5, "Use TestNotEqual instead (string tests are case insensitive by default)")
1989 CORE_API bool TestNotEqualInsensitive(const TCHAR* What, FStringView Actual, FStringView Expected);
1990 UE_DEPRECATED(5.5, "Use TestNotEqual instead (string tests are case insensitive by default)")
1991 CORE_API bool TestNotEqualInsensitive(const TCHAR* What, FUtf8StringView Actual, FUtf8StringView Expected);
1992
1993 CORE_API bool TestEqualSensitive(const TCHAR* What, const TCHAR* Actual, const TCHAR* Expected);
1994 CORE_API bool TestEqualSensitive(const TCHAR* What, FStringView Actual, FStringView Expected);
1995 bool TestEqualSensitive(const TCHAR* What, const FString& Actual, const FString& Expected)
1996 {
1997 return TestEqualSensitive(What, *Actual, *Expected);
1998 }
1999 CORE_API bool TestEqualSensitive(const TCHAR* What, FUtf8StringView Actual, FUtf8StringView Expected);
2000 CORE_API bool TestNotEqualSensitive(const TCHAR* What, const TCHAR* Actual, const TCHAR* Expected);
2001 CORE_API bool TestNotEqualSensitive(const TCHAR* What, FStringView Actual, FStringView Expected);
2002 bool TestNotEqualSensitive(const TCHAR* What, const FString& Actual, const FString& Expected)
2003 {
2004 return TestNotEqualSensitive(What, *Actual, *Expected);
2005 }
2006 CORE_API bool TestNotEqualSensitive(const TCHAR* What, FUtf8StringView Actual, FUtf8StringView Expected);
2007
2008 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, const int32 Actual, const int32 Expected)
2009 {
2010 return TestEqual(*What, Actual, Expected);
2011 }
2012
2013 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, const float Actual, const float Expected, float Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER)
2014 {
2015 return TestEqual(*What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance);
2016 }
2017
2018 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, const double Actual, const double Expected, double Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER)
2019 {
2020 return TestEqual(*What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance);
2021 }
2022
2023 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, const FVector Actual, const FVector Expected, float Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER)
2024 {
2025 return TestEqual(*What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance);
2026 }
2027
2028 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, const FTransform Actual, const FTransform Expected, float Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER)
2029 {
2030 return TestEqual(*What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance);
2031 }
2032
2033 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, const FRotator Actual, const FRotator Expected, float Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER)
2034 {
2035 return TestEqual(*What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance);
2036 }
2037
2038 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, const FColor Actual, const FColor Expected)
2039 {
2040 return TestEqual(*What, Actual, Expected);
2041 }
2042
2043 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, const TCHAR* Actual, const TCHAR* Expected)
2044 {
2045 return TestEqual(*What, Actual, Expected);
2046 }
2047
2048 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, FUtf8StringView Actual, FUtf8StringView Expected)
2049 {
2050 return TestEqual(*What, Actual, Expected);
2051 }
2052
2053 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, FStringView Actual, FStringView Expected)
2054 {
2055 return TestEqual(*What, Actual, Expected);
2056 }
2057
2058 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, FStringView Actual, FUtf8StringView Expected)
2059 {
2060 // This overload is here because there are some tests that have raw string literals as the expected value.
2061 FString Tmp(Expected);
2062 return TestEqual(*What, Actual, Tmp);
2063 }
2064
2065 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, FUtf8StringView Actual, FStringView Expected)
2066 {
2067 // This overload is here because there are some tests that have raw string literals as the Actual value.
2068 FString Tmp(Actual);
2069 return TestEqual(*What, Tmp, Expected);
2070 }
2071
2072 bool TestEqualSensitive(const FString& What, const TCHAR* Actual, const TCHAR* Expected)
2073 {
2074 return TestEqualSensitive(*What, Actual, Expected);
2075 }
2076
2077 bool TestEqualSensitive(const FString& What, FUtf8StringView Actual, FUtf8StringView Expected)
2078 {
2079 return TestEqualSensitive(*What, Actual, Expected);
2080 }
2081
2082 bool TestEqualSensitive(const FString& What, FStringView Actual, FStringView Expected)
2083 {
2084 return TestEqualSensitive(*What, Actual, Expected);
2085 }
2086
2087 bool TestEqualSensitive(const FString& What, FStringView Actual, FUtf8StringView Expected)
2088 {
2089 // This overload is here because there are some tests that have raw string literals as the expected value.
2090 FString Tmp(Expected);
2091 return TestEqualSensitive(*What, Actual, Tmp);
2092 }
2093
2094 bool TestEqualSensitive(const FString& What, FUtf8StringView Actual, FStringView Expected)
2095 {
2096 // This overload is here because there are some tests that have raw string literals as the Actual value.
2097 FString Tmp(Actual);
2098 return TestEqualSensitive(*What, Tmp, Expected);
2099 }
2100
2101 bool TestNotEqualSensitive(const FString& What, const TCHAR* Actual, const TCHAR* Expected)
2102 {
2103 return TestNotEqualSensitive(*What, Actual, Expected);
2104 }
2105
2106 bool TestNotEqualSensitive(const FString& What, FUtf8StringView Actual, FUtf8StringView Expected)
2107 {
2108 return TestNotEqualSensitive(*What, Actual, Expected);
2109 }
2110
2111 bool TestNotEqualSensitive(const FString& What, FStringView Actual, FStringView Expected)
2112 {
2113 return TestNotEqualSensitive(*What, Actual, Expected);
2114 }
2115
2116 bool TestNotEqualSensitive(const FString& What, FStringView Actual, FUtf8StringView Expected)
2117 {
2118 // This overload is here because there are some tests that have raw string literals as the expected value.
2119 FString Tmp(Expected);
2120 return TestNotEqualSensitive(*What, Actual, Tmp);
2121 }
2122
2123 bool TestNotEqualSensitive(const FString& What, FUtf8StringView Actual, FStringView Expected)
2124 {
2125 // This overload is here because there are some tests that have raw string literals as the Actual value.
2126 FString Tmp(Actual);
2127 return TestNotEqualSensitive(*What, Tmp, Expected);
2128 }
2129
2139 template<typename ValueType>
2140 FORCEINLINE bool TestEqual(const TCHAR* What, const ValueType& Actual, const ValueType& Expected)
2141 {
2142 if (Actual != Expected)
2143 {
2144 AddError(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s: The two values are not equal."), What));
2145 return false;
2146 }
2147 return true;
2148 }
2149
2150 template<typename ValueType>
2151 bool TestEqual(const FString& What, const ValueType& Actual, const ValueType& Expected)
2152 {
2153 return TestEqual(*What, Actual, Expected);
2154 }
2155

2170 }

2178 {

2180 }
2181
2182 bool TestNearlyEqual(const FString& What, const FRotator Actual, const FRotator Expected, float Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER)
2183 {

2189 CORE_API bool TestGreaterThan(const TCHAR* What, const int32 Actual, const int32 Expected);

2298 CORE_API bool TestFalse(const TCHAR* What, bool Value);
2299
2300 bool TestFalse(const FString& What, bool Value)
2301 {
2302 return TestFalse(*What, Value);

2306 #define TestFalseExpr(Expression) TestFalse(TEXT(#Expression), Expression)
2307
2316 template<typename ValueType>
2317 FORCEINLINE bool TestInvalid(const TCHAR* Description, const ValueType& Value)
2318 {
2319 if (Value.IsValid())
2320 {
2321 AddError(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s: The value is valid (.IsValid() returned true)."), Description));
2322 return false;
2323 }
2324 return true;
2325 }
2326
2327 template<typename ValueType>
2328 bool TestInvalid(const FString& Description, const ValueType& Value)
2329 {
2330 return TestInvalid(*Description, Value);
2331 }
2332
2342 template<typename ValueType>
2343 FORCEINLINE bool TestNotEqual(const TCHAR* Description, const ValueType& Actual, const ValueType& Expected)
2344 {
2345 if (Actual == Expected)
2346 {
2347 AddError(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s: The two values are equal."), Description));
2348 return false;
2349 }
2350 return true;
2351 }
2352
2353 template<typename ValueType> bool TestNotEqual(const FString& Description, const ValueType& Actual, const ValueType& Expected)
2354 {
2355 return TestNotEqual(*Description, Actual, Expected);
2356 }
2357
2358 CORE_API bool TestNotEqual(const TCHAR* What, const float Actual, const float Expected, float Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER);
2359 CORE_API bool TestNotEqual(const TCHAR* What, const double Actual, const double Expected, double Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER);
2360
2361 bool TestNotEqual(const FString& What, const float Actual, const float Expected, float Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER)
2362 {
2363 return TestNotEqual(*What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance);
2364 }
2365
2366 bool TestNotEqual(const FString& What, const double Actual, const double Expected, double Tolerance = UE_KINDA_SMALL_NUMBER)
2367 {
2368 return TestNotEqual(*What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance);
2369 }
2370
2379 template<typename ValueType>
2380 FORCEINLINE bool TestNotNull(const TCHAR* What, const ValueType* Pointer)
2381 {
2382 if (Pointer == nullptr)
2383 {
2384 AddError(FString::Printf(TEXT("Expected '%s' to be not null."), What));
2385 return false;
2386 }
2387 return true;
2388 }
2389
2390 template<typename ValueType> bool TestNotNull(const FString& What, const ValueType* Pointer)
2391 {
2392 return TestNotNull(*What, Pointer);
2393 }
2394
2404 template<typename ValueType>
2405 FORCEINLINE bool TestNotSame(const TCHAR* Description, const ValueType& Actual, const ValueType& Expected)
2406 {
2407 if (&Actual == &Expected)
2408 {
2409 AddError(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s: The two values are the same."), Description));
2410 return false;
2411 }
2412 return true;
2413 }
2414
2415 template<typename ValueType> bool TestNotSame(const FString& Description, const ValueType& Actual, const ValueType& Expected)
2416 {
2417 return TestNotSame(*Description, Actual, Expected);
2418 }
2419
2429 template<typename ValueType>
2430 FORCEINLINE bool TestNotSamePtr(const TCHAR* Description, const ValueType* Actual, const ValueType* Expected)
2431 {
2432 if (nullptr == Actual)
2433 {
2434 AddWarning(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s: Actual value is nullptr."), Description));
2435 }
2436 if (nullptr == Expected)
2437 {
2438 AddWarning(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s: Expected value is nullptr, which may be unintended. If intentional consider instead using TestNotNull()."), Description));
2439 }
2440 if (Actual == Expected)
2441 {
2442 AddError(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s: The two pointers are the same."), Description));
2443 return false;
2444 }
2445 return true;
2446 }
2447
2448 template<typename ValueType> bool TestNotSamePtr(const FString& Description, const ValueType* Actual, const ValueType* Expected)
2449 {
2450 return TestNotSamePtr(*Description, Actual, Expected);
2451 }
2452
2461 CORE_API bool TestNull(const TCHAR* What, const void* Pointer);
2462
2463 bool TestNull(const FString& What, const void* Pointer)
2464 {
2465 return TestNull(*What, Pointer);
2466 }
2467
2477 template<typename ValueType>
2478 FORCEINLINE bool TestSame(const TCHAR* Description, const ValueType& Actual, const ValueType& Expected)
2479 {
2480 if (&Actual != &Expected)
2481 {
2482 AddError(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s: The two values are not the same."), Description));
2483 return false;
2484 }
2485 return true;
2486 }
2487
2488 template<typename ValueType> bool TestSame(const FString& Description, const ValueType& Actual, const ValueType& Expected)
2489 {
2490 return TestSame(*Description, Actual, Expected);
2491 }
2492
2502 template<typename ValueType>
2503 FORCEINLINE bool TestSamePtr(const TCHAR* Description, const ValueType* Actual, const ValueType* Expected)
2504 {
2505 if (nullptr == Actual)
2506 {
2507 AddWarning(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s: Actual value is nullptr."), Description));
2508 }
2509 if (nullptr == Expected)
2510 {
2511 AddWarning(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s: Expected value is nullptr, which may be unintended. If intentional consider instead using TestNull()."), Description));
2512 }
2513 if (Actual != Expected)
2514 {
2515 AddError(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s: The two pointers are not the same."), Description));
2516 return false;
2517 }
2518 return true;
2519 }
2520
2521 template<typename ValueType> bool TestSamePtr(const FString& Description, const ValueType* Actual, const ValueType* Expected)
2522 {
2523 return TestSamePtr(*Description, Actual, Expected);
2524 }
2525
2534 CORE_API bool TestTrue(const TCHAR* What, bool Value);
2535
2536 bool TestTrue(const FString& What, bool Value)
2537 {
2538 return TestTrue(*What, Value);
2539 }
2540
2542 #define TestTrueExpr(...) TestTrue(TEXT(#__VA_ARGS__), __VA_ARGS__)
2543
2552 template<typename ValueType>
2553 FORCEINLINE bool TestValid(const TCHAR* Description, const ValueType& Value)
2554 {
2555 if (!Value.IsValid())
2556 {
2557 AddError(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s: The value is not valid (.IsValid() returned false)."), Description));
2558 return false;
2559 }
2560 return true;
2561 }
2562
2563 template<typename ValueType>
2564 bool TestValid(const FString& Description, const ValueType& Value)
2565 {
2566 return TestValid(*Description, Value);
2567 }
2568
2569protected:
2576 virtual void GetTests(TArray<FString>& OutBeautifiedNames, TArray <FString>& OutTestCommands) const = 0;
2577
2584 virtual bool RunTest(const FString& Parameters)=0;
2585
2587 virtual void SetTestContext(FString Context) { TestParameterContext = Context; }
2588
2590 CORE_API EAutomationTestFlags ExtractAutomationTestFlags(FString InTagNotation);
2591
2592protected:
2593
2594 //Flag to indicate if this is a complex task
2595 bool bComplexTask;
2596
2597 //Flag to indicate if this test should be ran on it's own thread
2598 bool bRunOnSeparateThread;
2599
2601 bool bSuppressLogs = false;
2602
2604 FString TestName;
2605
2607 FString TestParameterContext;
2608
2610 FAutomationTestExecutionInfo ExecutionInfo;
2611
2612 //allow framework to call protected function
2613 friend class FAutomationTestFramework;
2614
2615private:
2622 CORE_API bool IsExpectedMessage(const FString& Message, const ELogVerbosity::Type& Verbosity = ELogVerbosity::All);
2623
2629 CORE_API void InternalSetSuccessState(bool bSuccessful);
2630
2636 FString GetStringValueToDisplay(FStringView Value) const;
2637 FString GetStringValueToDisplay(FUtf8StringView Value) const;
2638
2639 /* Log messages to be expected while processing this test.*/
2640 TSet<FAutomationExpectedMessage> ExpectedMessages;
2641
2643 FRWLock ActionCS;
2644};
2645
2646class FBDDAutomationTestBase : public FAutomationTestBase
2647{
2648public:
2649 FBDDAutomationTestBase(const FString& InName, const bool bInComplexTask)
2650 : FAutomationTestBase(InName, bInComplexTask)
2651 , bIsDiscoveryMode(false)
2652 , bBaseRunTestRan(false)
2653 {}
2654
2655 virtual bool RunTest(const FString& Parameters) override
2656 {
2657 bBaseRunTestRan = true;
2658 TestIdToExecute = Parameters;
2659
2660 return true;
2661 }
2662
2663 virtual void GetTests(TArray<FString>& OutBeautifiedNames, TArray <FString>& OutTestCommands) const override
2664 {
2665 const_cast<FBDDAutomationTestBase*>(this)->BeautifiedNames.Empty();
2666 const_cast<FBDDAutomationTestBase*>(this)->TestCommands.Empty();
2667
2668 bIsDiscoveryMode = true;
2669 const_cast<FBDDAutomationTestBase*>(this)->RunTest(FString());
2670 bIsDiscoveryMode = false;
2671
2672 OutBeautifiedNames.Append(BeautifiedNames);
2673 OutTestCommands.Append(TestCommands);
2674 bBaseRunTestRan = false;
2675 }
2676
2677 bool IsDiscoveryMode() const
2678 {
2679 return bIsDiscoveryMode;
2680 }
2681
2682 void xDescribe(const FString& InDescription, TFunction<void()> DoWork)
2683 {
2684 check(bBaseRunTestRan);
2685 //disabled this suite
2686 }
2687
2688 void Describe(const FString& InDescription, TFunction<void()> DoWork)
2689 {
2690 check(bBaseRunTestRan);
2691
2692 PushDescription(InDescription);
2693
2694 int32 OriginalBeforeEachCount = BeforeEachStack.Num();
2695 int32 OriginalAfterEachCount = AfterEachStack.Num();
2696
2697 DoWork();
2698
2699 check(OriginalBeforeEachCount <= BeforeEachStack.Num());
2700 if (OriginalBeforeEachCount != BeforeEachStack.Num())
2701 {
2702 BeforeEachStack.Pop();
2703 }
2704
2705 check(OriginalAfterEachCount <= AfterEachStack.Num());
2706 if (OriginalAfterEachCount != AfterEachStack.Num())
2707 {
2708 AfterEachStack.Pop();
2709 }
2710
2711 PopDescription(InDescription);
2712 }
2713
2714 void xIt(const FString& InDescription, TFunction<void()> DoWork)
2715 {
2716 check(bBaseRunTestRan);
2717 //disabled this spec
2718 }
2719
2720 void It(const FString& InDescription, TFunction<void()> DoWork)
2721 {
2722 check(bBaseRunTestRan);
2723
2724 PushDescription(InDescription);
2725
2726 if (bIsDiscoveryMode)
2727 {
2728 BeautifiedNames.Add(GetDescription());
2729
2730 bIsDiscoveryMode = false;
2731 TestCommands.Add(GetDescription());
2732 bIsDiscoveryMode = true;
2733 }
2734 else if (TestIdToExecute.IsEmpty() || GetDescription() == TestIdToExecute)
2735 {
2736 for (int32 Index = 0; Index < BeforeEachStack.Num(); Index++)
2737 {
2738 BeforeEachStack[Index]();
2739 }
2740
2741 DoWork();
2742
2743 for (int32 Index = AfterEachStack.Num() - 1; Index >= 0; Index--)
2744 {
2745 AfterEachStack[Index]();
2746 }
2747 }
2748
2749 PopDescription(InDescription);
2750 }
2751
2752 void BeforeEach(TFunction<void()> DoWork)
2753 {
2754 BeforeEachStack.Push(DoWork);
2755 }
2756
2757 void AfterEach(TFunction<void()> DoWork)
2758 {
2759 AfterEachStack.Push(DoWork);
2760 }
2761
2762private:
2763
2764 void PushDescription(const FString& InDescription)
2765 {
2766 Description.Add(InDescription);
2767 }
2768
2769 void PopDescription(const FString& InDescription)
2770 {
2771 Description.RemoveAt(Description.Num() - 1);
2772 }
2773
2774 FString GetDescription() const
2775 {
2776 FString CompleteDescription;
2777 for (int32 Index = 0; Index < Description.Num(); ++Index)
2778 {
2779 if (Description[Index].IsEmpty())
2780 {
2781 continue;
2782 }
2783
2784 if (CompleteDescription.IsEmpty())
2785 {
2786 CompleteDescription = Description[Index];
2787 }
2788 else if (FChar::IsWhitespace(CompleteDescription[CompleteDescription.Len() - 1]) || FChar::IsWhitespace(Description[Index][0]))
2789 {
2790 if (bIsDiscoveryMode)
2791 {
2792 CompleteDescription = CompleteDescription + TEXT(".") + Description[Index];
2793 }
2794 else
2795 {
2796 CompleteDescription = CompleteDescription + Description[Index];
2797 }
2798 }
2799 else
2800 {
2801 if (bIsDiscoveryMode)
2802 {
2803 CompleteDescription = FString::Printf(TEXT("%s.%s"), *CompleteDescription, *Description[Index]);
2804 }
2805 else
2806 {
2807 CompleteDescription = FString::Printf(TEXT("%s %s"), *CompleteDescription, *Description[Index]);
2808 }
2809 }
2810 }
2811
2812 return CompleteDescription;
2813 }
2814
2815private:
2816
2817 FString TestIdToExecute;
2818 TArray<FString> Description;
2819 TArray<TFunction<void()>> BeforeEachStack;
2820 TArray<TFunction<void()>> AfterEachStack;
2821
2822 TArray<FString> BeautifiedNames;
2823 TArray<FString> TestCommands;
2824 mutable bool bIsDiscoveryMode;
2825 mutable bool bBaseRunTestRan;
2826};
2827
2828DECLARE_DELEGATE(FDoneDelegate);
2829
2830class FAutomationSpecBase
2831 : public FAutomationTestBase
2832 , public TSharedFromThis<FAutomationSpecBase>
2833{
2834private:
2835
2836 class FSingleExecuteLatentCommand : public IAutomationLatentCommand
2837 {
2838 public:
2839 FSingleExecuteLatentCommand(const FAutomationSpecBase* const InSpec, TFunction<void()> InPredicate, bool bInSkipIfErrored = false)
2840 : Spec(InSpec)
2841 , Predicate(MoveTemp(InPredicate))
2842 , bSkipIfErrored(bInSkipIfErrored)
2843 { }
2844
2845 virtual ~FSingleExecuteLatentCommand()
2846 { }
2847
2848 virtual bool Update() override
2849 {
2850 if (bSkipIfErrored && Spec->HasAnyErrors())
2851 {
2852 return true;
2853 }
2854
2855 Predicate();
2856 return true;
2857 }
2858
2859 private:
2860
2861 const FAutomationSpecBase* const Spec;
2862 const TFunction<void()> Predicate;
2863 const bool bSkipIfErrored;
2864 };
2865
2866 class FUntilDoneLatentCommand : public IAutomationLatentCommand
2867 {
2868 public:
2869
2870 FUntilDoneLatentCommand(FAutomationSpecBase* const InSpec, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> InPredicate, const FTimespan& InTimeout, bool bInSkipIfErrored = false)
2871 : Spec(InSpec)
2872 , Predicate(MoveTemp(InPredicate))
2873 , Timeout(InTimeout)
2874 , bSkipIfErrored(bInSkipIfErrored)
2875 , bIsRunning(false)
2876 , bDone(false)
2877 { }
2878
2879 virtual ~FUntilDoneLatentCommand()
2880 { }
2881
2882 virtual bool Update() override
2883 {
2884 if (!bIsRunning)
2885 {
2886 if (bSkipIfErrored && Spec->HasAnyErrors())
2887 {
2888 return true;
2889 }
2890
2891 bDone = false;
2892 bIsRunning = true;
2893 StartedRunning = FDateTime::UtcNow();
2894 Predicate(FDoneDelegate::CreateSP(this, &FUntilDoneLatentCommand::Done));
2895 }
2896
2897 if (bDone)
2898 {
2899 Reset();
2900 return true;
2901 }
2902 else if (FDateTime::UtcNow() >= StartedRunning + Timeout)
2903 {
2904 Reset();
2905 Spec->AddError(TEXT("Latent command timed out."), 0);
2906 return true;
2907 }
2908
2909 return false;
2910 }
2911
2912 private:
2913
2914 void Done()
2915 {
2916 if (bIsRunning)
2917 {
2918 bDone = true;
2919 }
2920 }
2921
2922 void Reset()
2923 {
2924 // Reset the done for the next potential run of this command
2925 bDone = false;
2926 bIsRunning = false;
2927 }
2928
2929 private:
2930
2931 FAutomationSpecBase* const Spec;
2932 const TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> Predicate;
2933 const FTimespan Timeout;
2934 const bool bSkipIfErrored;
2935
2936 bool bIsRunning;
2937 FDateTime StartedRunning;
2938 FThreadSafeBool bDone;
2939 };
2940
2941 class FAsyncUntilDoneLatentCommand : public IAutomationLatentCommand
2942 {
2943 public:
2944
2945 FAsyncUntilDoneLatentCommand(FAutomationSpecBase* const InSpec, EAsyncExecution InExecution, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> InPredicate, const FTimespan& InTimeout, bool bInSkipIfErrored = false)
2946 : Spec(InSpec)
2947 , Execution(InExecution)
2948 , Predicate(MoveTemp(InPredicate))
2949 , Timeout(InTimeout)
2950 , bSkipIfErrored(bInSkipIfErrored)
2951 , bDone(false)
2952 { }
2953
2954 virtual ~FAsyncUntilDoneLatentCommand()
2955 { }
2956
2957 virtual bool Update() override
2958 {
2959 if (!Future.IsValid())
2960 {
2961 if (bSkipIfErrored && Spec->HasAnyErrors())
2962 {
2963 return true;
2964 }
2965
2966 FScopeLock CriticalSection(&ActionCS);
2967 bDone = false;
2968 StartedRunning = FDateTime::UtcNow();
2969 Future = Async(Execution, [this]() {
2970 Predicate(FDoneDelegate::CreateRaw(this, &FAsyncUntilDoneLatentCommand::Done));
2971 });
2972 }
2973
2974 if (bDone)
2975 {
2976 Reset();
2977 return true;
2978 }
2979 else if (FDateTime::UtcNow() >= StartedRunning + Timeout)
2980 {
2981 Reset();
2982 Spec->AddError(TEXT("Latent command timed out."), 0);
2983 return true;
2984 }
2985
2986 return false;
2987 }
2988
2989 private:
2990
2991 void Done()
2992 {
2993 FScopeLock CriticalSection(&ActionCS);
2994 if (Future.IsValid())
2995 {
2996 bDone = true;
2997 }
2998 }
2999
3000 void Reset()
3001 {
3002 FScopeLock CriticalSection(&ActionCS);
3003 // Reset the done for the next potential run of this command
3004 bDone = false;
3005 Future.Reset();
3006 }
3007
3008 private:
3009
3010 FAutomationSpecBase* const Spec;
3011 const EAsyncExecution Execution;
3012 const TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> Predicate;
3013 const FTimespan Timeout;
3014 const bool bSkipIfErrored;
3015
3016 FThreadSafeBool bDone;
3017 FDateTime StartedRunning;
3018 TFuture<void> Future;
3019 FCriticalSection ActionCS;
3020 };
3021
3022 class FAsyncLatentCommand : public IAutomationLatentCommand
3023 {
3024 public:
3025
3026 FAsyncLatentCommand(FAutomationSpecBase* const InSpec, EAsyncExecution InExecution, TFunction<void()> InPredicate, const FTimespan& InTimeout, bool bInSkipIfErrored = false)
3027 : Spec(InSpec)
3028 , Execution(InExecution)
3029 , Predicate(MoveTemp(InPredicate))
3030 , Timeout(InTimeout)
3031 , bSkipIfErrored(bInSkipIfErrored)
3032 , bDone(false)
3033 { }
3034
3035 virtual ~FAsyncLatentCommand()
3036 { }
3037
3038 virtual bool Update() override
3039 {
3040 if (!Future.IsValid())
3041 {
3042 if (bSkipIfErrored && Spec->HasAnyErrors())
3043 {
3044 return true;
3045 }
3046
3047 FScopeLock CriticalSection(&ActionCS);
3048 bDone = false;
3049 StartedRunning = FDateTime::UtcNow();
3050 Future = Async(Execution, [this]() {
3051 Predicate();
3052 Done();
3053 });
3054 }
3055
3056 if (bDone)
3057 {
3058 Reset();
3059 return true;
3060 }
3061 else if (FDateTime::UtcNow() >= StartedRunning + Timeout)
3062 {
3063 Reset();
3064 Spec->AddError(TEXT("Latent command timed out."), 0);
3065 return true;
3066 }
3067
3068 return false;
3069 }
3070
3071 private:
3072
3073 void Done()
3074 {
3075 FScopeLock CriticalSection(&ActionCS);
3076 if (Future.IsValid())
3077 {
3078 bDone = true;
3079 }
3080 }
3081
3082 void Reset()
3083 {
3084 FScopeLock CriticalSection(&ActionCS);
3085 // Reset the done for the next potential run of this command
3086 bDone = false;
3087 Future.Reset();
3088 }
3089
3090 private:
3091
3092 FAutomationSpecBase* const Spec;
3093 const EAsyncExecution Execution;
3094 const TFunction<void()> Predicate;
3095 const FTimespan Timeout;
3096 const bool bSkipIfErrored;
3097
3098 FThreadSafeBool bDone;
3099 FDateTime StartedRunning;
3100 TFuture<void> Future;
3101 FCriticalSection ActionCS;
3102 };
3103
3104 struct FSpecIt
3105 {
3106 public:
3107
3108 FString Description;
3109 FString Id;
3110 FString Filename;
3111 int32 LineNumber;
3112 TSharedRef<IAutomationLatentCommand> Command;
3113
3114 FSpecIt(FString InDescription, FString InId, FString InFilename, int32 InLineNumber, TSharedRef<IAutomationLatentCommand> InCommand)
3115 : Description(MoveTemp(InDescription))
3116 , Id(MoveTemp(InId))
3117 , Filename(InFilename)
3118 , LineNumber(MoveTemp(InLineNumber))
3119 , Command(MoveTemp(InCommand))
3120 { }
3121 };
3122
3123 struct FSpecDefinitionScope
3124 {
3125 public:
3126
3127 FString Description;
3128
3129 TArray<TSharedRef<IAutomationLatentCommand>> BeforeEach;
3130 TArray<TSharedRef<FSpecIt>> It;
3131 TArray<TSharedRef<IAutomationLatentCommand>> AfterEach;
3132
3133 TArray<TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope>> Children;
3134 };
3135
3136 struct FSpec
3137 {
3138 public:
3139
3140 FString Id;
3141 FString Description;
3142 FString Filename;
3143 int32 LineNumber;
3144 TArray<TSharedRef<IAutomationLatentCommand>> Commands;
3145 };
3146
3147public:
3148
3149 FAutomationSpecBase(const FString& InName, const bool bInComplexTask)
3150 : FAutomationTestBase(InName, bInComplexTask)
3151 , DefaultTimeout(FTimespan::FromSeconds(30))
3152 , bEnableSkipIfError(true)
3153 , RootDefinitionScope(MakeShareable(new FSpecDefinitionScope()))
3154 , bHasBeenDefined(false)
3155 {
3156 DefinitionScopeStack.Push(RootDefinitionScope.ToSharedRef());
3157 }
3158
3159 virtual bool RunTest(const FString& InParameters) override
3160 {
3161 EnsureDefinitions();
3162
3163 if (!InParameters.IsEmpty())
3164 {
3165 const TSharedRef<FSpec>* SpecToRun = IdToSpecMap.Find(InParameters);
3166 if (SpecToRun != nullptr)
3167 {
3168 for (int32 Index = 0; Index < (*SpecToRun)->Commands.Num(); ++Index)
3169 {
3170 FAutomationTestFramework::GetInstance().EnqueueLatentCommand((*SpecToRun)->Commands[Index]);
3171 }
3172 }
3173 }
3174 else
3175 {
3176 TArray<TSharedRef<FSpec>> Specs;
3177 IdToSpecMap.GenerateValueArray(Specs);
3178
3179 for (int32 SpecIndex = 0; SpecIndex < Specs.Num(); SpecIndex++)
3180 {
3181 for (int32 CommandIndex = 0; CommandIndex < Specs[SpecIndex]->Commands.Num(); ++CommandIndex)
3182 {
3183 FAutomationTestFramework::GetInstance().EnqueueLatentCommand(Specs[SpecIndex]->Commands[CommandIndex]);
3184 }
3185 }
3186 }
3187
3188 return true;
3189 }
3190
3191 virtual bool IsStressTest() const
3192 {
3193 return false;
3194 }
3195
3196 virtual uint32 GetRequiredDeviceNum() const override
3197 {
3198 return 1;
3199 }
3200
3201 virtual FString GetTestSourceFileName(const FString& InTestName) const override
3202 {
3203 FString TestId = InTestName;
3204 if (TestId.StartsWith(TestName + TEXT(" ")))
3205 {
3206 TestId = InTestName.RightChop(TestName.Len() + 1);
3207 }
3208
3209 const TSharedRef<FSpec>* Spec = IdToSpecMap.Find(TestId);
3210 if (Spec != nullptr)
3211 {
3212 return (*Spec)->Filename;
3213 }
3214
3215 return FAutomationTestBase::GetTestSourceFileName();
3216 }
3217
3218 virtual int32 GetTestSourceFileLine(const FString& InTestName) const override
3219 {
3220 FString TestId = InTestName;
3221 if (TestId.StartsWith(TestName + TEXT(" ")))
3222 {
3223 TestId = InTestName.RightChop(TestName.Len() + 1);
3224 }
3225
3226 const TSharedRef<FSpec>* Spec = IdToSpecMap.Find(TestId);
3227 if (Spec != nullptr)
3228 {
3229 return (*Spec)->LineNumber;
3230 }
3231
3232 return FAutomationTestBase::GetTestSourceFileLine();
3233 }
3234
3235 virtual void GetTests(TArray<FString>& OutBeautifiedNames, TArray<FString>& OutTestCommands) const override
3236 {
3237 EnsureDefinitions();
3238
3239 TArray<TSharedRef<FSpec>> Specs;
3240 IdToSpecMap.GenerateValueArray(Specs);
3241
3242 for (int32 Index = 0; Index < Specs.Num(); Index++)
3243 {
3244 OutTestCommands.Push(Specs[Index]->Id);
3245 OutBeautifiedNames.Push(Specs[Index]->Description);
3246 }
3247 }
3248
3249 void xDescribe(const FString& InDescription, TFunction<void()> DoWork)
3250 {
3251 //disabled
3252 }
3253
3254 void Describe(const TArray<FString> InDescriptions, TFunction<void(int32 /*Iteration*/)> DoWork)
3255 {
3256 LLM_SCOPE_BYNAME(TEXT("AutomationTest/Framework"));
3257
3258 for (int32 It = 0; It < InDescriptions.Num(); ++It)
3259 {
3260 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> ParentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3261 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> NewScope = MakeShareable(new FSpecDefinitionScope());
3262 NewScope->Description = InDescriptions[It];
3263 ParentScope->Children.Push(NewScope);
3264
3265 DefinitionScopeStack.Push(NewScope);
3266 PushDescription(InDescriptions[It]);
3267 DoWork(It);
3268 PopDescription(InDescriptions[It]);
3269 DefinitionScopeStack.Pop();
3270
3271 if (NewScope->It.Num() == 0 && NewScope->Children.Num() == 0)
3272 {
3273 ParentScope->Children.Remove(NewScope);
3274 }
3275 }
3276 }
3277
3278 void Describe(const FString& InDescription, TFunction<void()> DoWork)
3279 {
3280 Describe({InDescription}, [DoWork](int32){DoWork();});
3281 }
3282
3283 void xIt(const FString& InDescription, TFunction<void()> DoWork)
3284 {
3285 //disabled
3286 }
3287
3288 void xIt(const FString& InDescription, EAsyncExecution Execution, TFunction<void()> DoWork)
3289 {
3290 //disabled
3291 }
3292

3294 {
3295 //disabled
3296 }

3299 {
3300 //disabled
3301 }
3302

3304 {
3305 //disabled

3307

3309 {
3310 //disabled
3311 }
3312
3313 void xLatentIt(const FString& InDescription, EAsyncExecution Execution, const FTimespan& Timeout, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork)
3314 {
3315 //disabled
3316 }
3317
3318 void It(const FString& InDescription, TFunction<void()> DoWork, UE::FSourceLocation Location = UE::FSourceLocation::Current())
3319 {
3320 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3321
3322 PushDescription(InDescription);
3323 CurrentScope->It.Push(MakeShareable(new FSpecIt(GetDescription(), GetId(), Location.GetFileName(), Location.GetLine(), MakeShareable(new FSingleExecuteLatentCommand(this, DoWork, bEnableSkipIfError)))));
3324 PopDescription(InDescription);
3325 }
3326
3327 void It(const FString& InDescription, EAsyncExecution Execution, TFunction<void()> DoWork, UE::FSourceLocation Location = UE::FSourceLocation::Current())
3328 {
3329 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3330
3331 PushDescription(InDescription);
3332 CurrentScope->It.Push(MakeShareable(new FSpecIt(GetDescription(), GetId(), Location.GetFileName(), Location.GetLine(), MakeShareable(new FAsyncLatentCommand(this, Execution, DoWork, DefaultTimeout, bEnableSkipIfError)))));
3333 PopDescription(InDescription);
3334 }
3335
3336 void It(const FString& InDescription, EAsyncExecution Execution, const FTimespan& Timeout, TFunction<void()> DoWork, UE::FSourceLocation Location = UE::FSourceLocation::Current())
3337 {
3338 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3339
3340 PushDescription(InDescription);
3341 CurrentScope->It.Push(MakeShareable(new FSpecIt(GetDescription(), GetId(), Location.GetFileName(), Location.GetLine(), MakeShareable(new FAsyncLatentCommand(this, Execution, DoWork, Timeout, bEnableSkipIfError)))));
3342 PopDescription(InDescription);
3343 }
3344
3345 void LatentIt(const FString& InDescription, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork, UE::FSourceLocation Location = UE::FSourceLocation::Current())
3346 {
3347 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3348
3349 PushDescription(InDescription);
3350 CurrentScope->It.Push(MakeShareable(new FSpecIt(GetDescription(), GetId(), Location.GetFileName(), Location.GetLine(), MakeShareable(new FUntilDoneLatentCommand(this, DoWork, DefaultTimeout, bEnableSkipIfError)))));
3351 PopDescription(InDescription);
3352 }
3353
3354 void LatentIt(const FString& InDescription, const FTimespan& Timeout, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork, UE::FSourceLocation Location = UE::FSourceLocation::Current())
3355 {
3356 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3357
3358 PushDescription(InDescription);
3359 CurrentScope->It.Push(MakeShareable(new FSpecIt(GetDescription(), GetId(), Location.GetFileName(), Location.GetLine(), MakeShareable(new FUntilDoneLatentCommand(this, DoWork, Timeout, bEnableSkipIfError)))));
3360 PopDescription(InDescription);
3361 }
3362
3363 void LatentIt(const FString& InDescription, EAsyncExecution Execution, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork, UE::FSourceLocation Location = UE::FSourceLocation::Current())
3364 {
3365 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3366
3367 PushDescription(InDescription);
3368 CurrentScope->It.Push(MakeShareable(new FSpecIt(GetDescription(), GetId(), Location.GetFileName(), Location.GetLine(), MakeShareable(new FAsyncUntilDoneLatentCommand(this, Execution, DoWork, DefaultTimeout, bEnableSkipIfError)))));
3369 PopDescription(InDescription);
3370 }
3371
3372 void LatentIt(const FString& InDescription, EAsyncExecution Execution, const FTimespan& Timeout, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork, UE::FSourceLocation Location = UE::FSourceLocation::Current())
3373 {
3374 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3375
3376 PushDescription(InDescription);
3377 CurrentScope->It.Push(MakeShareable(new FSpecIt(GetDescription(), GetId(), Location.GetFileName(), Location.GetLine(), MakeShareable(new FAsyncUntilDoneLatentCommand(this, Execution, DoWork, Timeout, bEnableSkipIfError)))));
3378 PopDescription(InDescription);
3379 }

3415
3416 void BeforeEach(TFunction<void()> DoWork)
3417 {

3419 CurrentScope->BeforeEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FSingleExecuteLatentCommand(this, DoWork, bEnableSkipIfError)));
3420 }
3421
3422 void BeforeEach(EAsyncExecution Execution, TFunction<void()> DoWork)
3423 {
3424 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3425 CurrentScope->BeforeEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FAsyncLatentCommand(this, Execution, DoWork, DefaultTimeout, bEnableSkipIfError)));
3426 }
3427
3428 void BeforeEach(EAsyncExecution Execution, const FTimespan& Timeout, TFunction<void()> DoWork)
3429 {
3430 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3431 CurrentScope->BeforeEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FAsyncLatentCommand(this, Execution, DoWork, Timeout, bEnableSkipIfError)));
3432 }
3433
3434 void LatentBeforeEach(TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork)
3435 {
3436 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3437 CurrentScope->BeforeEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FUntilDoneLatentCommand(this, DoWork, DefaultTimeout, bEnableSkipIfError)));
3438 }
3439
3440 void LatentBeforeEach(const FTimespan& Timeout, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork)
3441 {
3442 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3443 CurrentScope->BeforeEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FUntilDoneLatentCommand(this, DoWork, Timeout, bEnableSkipIfError)));
3444 }
3445
3446 void LatentBeforeEach(EAsyncExecution Execution, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork)
3447 {
3448 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3449 CurrentScope->BeforeEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FAsyncUntilDoneLatentCommand(this, Execution, DoWork, DefaultTimeout, bEnableSkipIfError)));
3450 }
3451
3452 void LatentBeforeEach(EAsyncExecution Execution, const FTimespan& Timeout, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork)
3453 {
3454 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3455 CurrentScope->BeforeEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FAsyncUntilDoneLatentCommand(this, Execution, DoWork, Timeout, bEnableSkipIfError)));
3456 }
3457

3464 {

3474 {

3476 }
3477

3479 {

3484 {

3489 {
