3492
3493 void AfterEach(TFunction<void()> DoWork)
3494 {
3495 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3496 CurrentScope->AfterEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FSingleExecuteLatentCommand(this, DoWork)));
3497 }
3498
3499 void AfterEach(EAsyncExecution Execution, TFunction<void()> DoWork)
3500 {
3501 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3502 CurrentScope->AfterEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FAsyncLatentCommand(this, Execution, DoWork, DefaultTimeout)));
3503 }
3504
3505 void AfterEach(EAsyncExecution Execution, const FTimespan& Timeout, TFunction<void()> DoWork)
3506 {
3507 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3508 CurrentScope->AfterEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FAsyncLatentCommand(this, Execution, DoWork, Timeout)));
3509 }
3510
3511 void LatentAfterEach(TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork)
3512 {
3513 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3514 CurrentScope->AfterEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FUntilDoneLatentCommand(this, DoWork, DefaultTimeout)));
3515 }
3516
3517 void LatentAfterEach(const FTimespan& Timeout, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork)
3518 {
3519 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3520 CurrentScope->AfterEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FUntilDoneLatentCommand(this, DoWork, Timeout)));
3521 }
3522
3523 void LatentAfterEach(EAsyncExecution Execution, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork)
3524 {
3525 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3526 CurrentScope->AfterEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FAsyncUntilDoneLatentCommand(this, Execution, DoWork, DefaultTimeout)));
3527 }
3528
3529 void LatentAfterEach(EAsyncExecution Execution, const FTimespan& Timeout, TFunction<void(const FDoneDelegate&)> DoWork)
3530 {
3531 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> CurrentScope = DefinitionScopeStack.Last();
3532 CurrentScope->AfterEach.Push(MakeShareable(new FAsyncUntilDoneLatentCommand(this, Execution, DoWork, Timeout)));
3533 }
3534
3535protected:
3536
3537 /* The timespan for how long a block should be allowed to execute before giving up and failing the test */
3538 FTimespan DefaultTimeout;
3539
3540 /* Whether or not BeforeEach and It blocks should skip execution if the test has already failed */
3541 bool bEnableSkipIfError;
3542
3543 void EnsureDefinitions() const
3544 {
3545 if (!bHasBeenDefined)
3546 {
3547 const_cast<FAutomationSpecBase*>(this)->Define();
3548 const_cast<FAutomationSpecBase*>(this)->PostDefine();
3549 }
3550 }
3551
3552 virtual void Define() = 0;
3553
3554 void PostDefine()
3555 {
3556 TArray<TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope>> Stack;
3557 Stack.Push(RootDefinitionScope.ToSharedRef());
3558
3559 TArray<TSharedRef<IAutomationLatentCommand>> BeforeEach;
3560 TArray<TSharedRef<IAutomationLatentCommand>> AfterEach;
3561
3562 while (Stack.Num() > 0)
3563 {
3564 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> Scope = Stack.Last();
3565
3566 BeforeEach.Append(Scope->BeforeEach);
3567 AfterEach.Append(Scope->AfterEach); // iterate in reverse
3568
3569 for (int32 ItIndex = 0; ItIndex < Scope->It.Num(); ItIndex++)
3570 {
3571 TSharedRef<FSpecIt> It = Scope->It[ItIndex];
3572
3573 TSharedRef<FSpec> Spec = MakeShareable(new FSpec());
3574 Spec->Id = It->Id;
3575 Spec->Description = It->Description;
3576 Spec->Filename = It->Filename;
3577 Spec->LineNumber = It->LineNumber;
3578 Spec->Commands.Append(BeforeEach);
3579 Spec->Commands.Add(It->Command);
3580
3581 for (int32 AfterEachIndex = AfterEach.Num() - 1; AfterEachIndex >= 0; AfterEachIndex--)
3582 {
3583 Spec->Commands.Add(AfterEach[AfterEachIndex]);
3584 }
3585
3586 check(!IdToSpecMap.Contains(Spec->Id));
3587 IdToSpecMap.Add(Spec->Id, Spec);
3588 }
3589 Scope->It.Empty();
3590
3591 if (Scope->Children.Num() > 0)
3592 {
3593 Stack.Append(Scope->Children);
3594 Scope->Children.Empty();
3595 }
3596 else
3597 {
3598 while (Stack.Num() > 0 && Stack.Last()->Children.Num() == 0 && Stack.Last()->It.Num() == 0)
3599 {
3600 const TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope> PoppedScope = Stack.Pop();
3601
3602 if (PoppedScope->BeforeEach.Num() > 0)
3603 {
3604 BeforeEach.RemoveAt(BeforeEach.Num() - PoppedScope->BeforeEach.Num(), PoppedScope->BeforeEach.Num());
3605 }
3606
3607 if (PoppedScope->AfterEach.Num() > 0)
3608 {
3609 AfterEach.RemoveAt(AfterEach.Num() - PoppedScope->AfterEach.Num(), PoppedScope->AfterEach.Num());
3610 }
3611 }
3612 }
3613 }
3614
3615 RootDefinitionScope.Reset();
3616 DefinitionScopeStack.Reset();
3617 bHasBeenDefined = true;
3618 }
3619
3620 void Redefine()
3621 {
3622 Description.Empty();
3623 IdToSpecMap.Empty();
3624 RootDefinitionScope.Reset();
3625 DefinitionScopeStack.Empty();
3626 bHasBeenDefined = false;
3627
3628 RootDefinitionScope = MakeShareable(new FSpecDefinitionScope());
3629 DefinitionScopeStack.Push(RootDefinitionScope.ToSharedRef());
3630 }
3631
3632private:
3633
3634 void PushDescription(const FString& InDescription)
3635 {
3636 LLM_SCOPE_BYNAME(TEXT("AutomationTest/Framework"));
3637 Description.Add(InDescription);
3638 }
3639
3640 void PopDescription(const FString& InDescription)
3641 {
3642 Description.RemoveAt(Description.Num() - 1);
3643 }
3644
3645 FString GetDescription() const
3646 {
3647 FString CompleteDescription;
3648 for (int32 Index = 0; Index < Description.Num(); ++Index)
3649 {
3650 if (Description[Index].IsEmpty())
3651 {
3652 continue;
3653 }
3654
3655 if (CompleteDescription.IsEmpty())
3656 {
3657 CompleteDescription = Description[Index];
3658 }
3659 else if (FChar::IsWhitespace(CompleteDescription[CompleteDescription.Len() - 1]) || FChar::IsWhitespace(Description[Index][0]))
3660 {
3661 CompleteDescription = CompleteDescription + TEXT(".") + Description[Index];
3662 }
3663 else
3664 {
3665 CompleteDescription = FString::Printf(TEXT("%s.%s"), *CompleteDescription, *Description[Index]);
3666 }
3667 }
3668
3669 return CompleteDescription;
3670 }
3671
3672 FString GetId() const
3673 {
3674 if (Description.Last().EndsWith(TEXT("]")))
3675 {
3676 FString ItDescription = Description.Last();
3677 ItDescription.RemoveAt(ItDescription.Len() - 1);
3678
3679 int32 StartingBraceIndex = INDEX_NONE;
3680 if (ItDescription.FindLastChar(TEXT('['), StartingBraceIndex) && StartingBraceIndex != ItDescription.Len() - 1)
3681 {
3682 FString CommandId = ItDescription.RightChop(StartingBraceIndex + 1);
3683 return CommandId;
3684 }
3685 }
3686
3687 FString CompleteId;
3688 for (int32 Index = 0; Index < Description.Num(); ++Index)
3689 {
3690 if (Description[Index].IsEmpty())
3691 {
3692 continue;
3693 }
3694
3695 if (CompleteId.IsEmpty())
3696 {
3697 CompleteId = Description[Index];
3698 }
3699 else if (FChar::IsWhitespace(CompleteId[CompleteId.Len() - 1]) || FChar::IsWhitespace(Description[Index][0]))
3700 {
3701 CompleteId = CompleteId + Description[Index];
3702 }
3703 else
3704 {
3705 CompleteId = FString::Printf(TEXT("%s %s"), *CompleteId, *Description[Index]);
3706 }
3707 }
3708
3709 return CompleteId;
3710 }
3711
3712private:
3713 TArray<FString> Description;
3714 TMap<FString, TSharedRef<FSpec>> IdToSpecMap;
3715 TSharedPtr<FSpecDefinitionScope> RootDefinitionScope;
3716 TArray<TSharedRef<FSpecDefinitionScope>> DefinitionScopeStack;
3717 bool bHasBeenDefined;
3718};
3719
3720
3722// Latent command definition macros
3723
3724#define DEFINE_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND(CommandName) \
3725class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommand \
3726 { \
3727 public: \
3728 virtual ~CommandName() \
3729 {} \
3730 virtual bool Update() override; \
3731}
3732
3733#define DEFINE_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_ONE_PARAMETER(CommandName,ParamType,ParamName) \
3734class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommand \
3735 { \
3736 public: \
3737 CommandName(ParamType InputParam) \
3738 : ParamName(InputParam) \
3739 {} \
3740 virtual ~CommandName() \
3741 {} \
3742 virtual bool Update() override; \
3743 private: \
3744 ParamType ParamName; \
3745}
3746
3747#define DEFINE_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_TWO_PARAMETER(CommandName,ParamType0,ParamName0,ParamType1,ParamName1) \
3748class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommand \
3749 { \
3750 public: \
3751 CommandName(ParamType0 InputParam0, ParamType1 InputParam1) \
3752 : ParamName0(InputParam0) \
3753 , ParamName1(InputParam1) \
3754 {} \
3755 virtual ~CommandName() \
3756 {} \
3757 virtual bool Update() override; \
3758 private: \
3759 ParamType0 ParamName0; \
3760 ParamType1 ParamName1; \
3761}
3762
3763#define DEFINE_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_THREE_PARAMETER(CommandName,ParamType0,ParamName0,ParamType1,ParamName1,ParamType2,ParamName2) \
3764class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommand \
3765 { \
3766 public: \
3767 CommandName(ParamType0 InputParam0, ParamType1 InputParam1, ParamType2 InputParam2) \
3768 : ParamName0(InputParam0) \
3769 , ParamName1(InputParam1) \
3770 , ParamName2(InputParam2) \
3771 {} \
3772 virtual ~CommandName() \
3773 {} \
3774 virtual bool Update() override; \
3775 private: \
3776 ParamType0 ParamName0; \
3777 ParamType1 ParamName1; \
3778 ParamType2 ParamName2; \
3779}
3780
3781#define DEFINE_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_FOUR_PARAMETER(CommandName,ParamType0,ParamName0,ParamType1,ParamName1,ParamType2,ParamName2,ParamType3,ParamName3) \
3782class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommand \
3783 { \
3784 public: \
3785 CommandName(ParamType0 InputParam0, ParamType1 InputParam1, ParamType2 InputParam2, ParamType3 InputParam3) \
3786 : ParamName0(InputParam0) \
3787 , ParamName1(InputParam1) \
3788 , ParamName2(InputParam2) \
3789 , ParamName3(InputParam3) \
3790 {} \
3791 virtual ~CommandName() \
3792 {} \
3793 virtual bool Update() override; \
3794 private: \
3795 ParamType0 ParamName0; \
3796 ParamType1 ParamName1; \
3797 ParamType2 ParamName2; \
3798 ParamType3 ParamName3; \
3799}
3800
3801#define DEFINE_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_FIVE_PARAMETER(CommandName,ParamType0,ParamName0,ParamType1,ParamName1,ParamType2,ParamName2,ParamType3,ParamName3,ParamType4,ParamName4) \
3802class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommand \
3803 { \
3804 public: \
3805 CommandName(ParamType0 InputParam0, ParamType1 InputParam1, ParamType2 InputParam2, ParamType3 InputParam3, ParamType4 InputParam4) \
3806 : ParamName0(InputParam0) \
3807 , ParamName1(InputParam1) \
3808 , ParamName2(InputParam2) \
3809 , ParamName3(InputParam3) \
3810 , ParamName4(InputParam4) \
3811 {} \
3812 virtual ~CommandName() \
3813 {} \
3814 virtual bool Update() override; \
3815 private: \
3816 ParamType0 ParamName0; \
3817 ParamType1 ParamName1; \
3818 ParamType2 ParamName2; \
3819 ParamType3 ParamName3; \
3820 ParamType4 ParamName4; \
3821}
3822
3823#define DEFINE_EXPORTED_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND(EXPORT_API, CommandName) \
3824class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommand \
3825 { \
3826 public: \
3827 virtual ~CommandName() \
3828 {} \
3829 EXPORT_API virtual bool Update() override; \
3830}
3831
3832#define DEFINE_EXPORTED_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_ONE_PARAMETER(EXPORT_API, CommandName,ParamType,ParamName) \
3833class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommand \
3834 { \
3835 public: \
3836 CommandName(ParamType InputParam) \
3837 : ParamName(InputParam) \
3838 {} \
3839 virtual ~CommandName() \
3840 {} \
3841 EXPORT_API virtual bool Update() override; \
3842 private: \
3843 ParamType ParamName; \
3844}
3845
3846#define DEFINE_EXPORTED_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_TWO_PARAMETER(EXPORT_API, CommandName,ParamType0,ParamName0,ParamType1,ParamName1) \
3847class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommand \
3848 { \
3849 public: \
3850 CommandName(ParamType0 InputParam0, ParamType1 InputParam1) \
3851 : ParamName0(InputParam0) \
3852 , ParamName1(InputParam1) \
3853 {} \
3854 virtual ~CommandName() \
3855 {} \
3856 EXPORT_API virtual bool Update() override; \
3857 private: \
3858 ParamType0 ParamName0; \
3859 ParamType1 ParamName1; \
3860}
3861
3862#define DEFINE_ENGINE_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND(CommandName) \
3863 DEFINE_EXPORTED_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND(ENGINE_API, CommandName)
3864
3865#define DEFINE_ENGINE_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_ONE_PARAMETER(CommandName,ParamType,ParamName) \
3866 DEFINE_EXPORTED_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_ONE_PARAMETER(ENGINE_API, CommandName, ParamType, ParamName)
3867
3868#define DEFINE_EXPORTED_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_WITH_RETRIES(EXPORT_API,CommandName,RetryCount,WaitTimeBetweenRuns) \
3869class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays \
3870 { \
3871 public: \
3872 CommandName(int32 InRetryCount, double InWaitTimeBetweenRuns) \
3873 : IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays(#CommandName, InRetryCount, InWaitTimeBetweenRuns) \
3874 {} \
3875 virtual ~CommandName() \
3876 {} \
3877 EXPORT_API virtual bool Execute() override; \
3878 private: \
3879}
3880
3881#define DEFINE_EXPORTED_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_WITH_RETRIES_ONE_PARAMETER(EXPORT_API,CommandName,RetryCount,WaitTimeBetweenRuns,ParamType,ParamName) \
3882class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays \
3883 { \
3884 public: \
3885 CommandName(int32 InRetryCount, double InWaitTimeBetweenRuns, ParamType ParamName) \
3886 : IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays(#CommandName, InRetryCount, InWaitTimeBetweenRuns) \
3887 , ParamName(ParamName) \
3888 {} \
3889 virtual ~CommandName() \
3890 {} \
3891 EXPORT_API virtual bool Execute() override; \
3892 private: \
3893 ParamType ParamName; \
3894}
3895
3896#define DEFINE_EXPORTED_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_WITH_RETRIES_TWO_PARAMETERS(EXPORT_API,CommandName,RetryCount,WaitTimeBetweenRuns,ParamType0,ParamName0,ParamType1,ParamName1) \
3897class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays \
3898 { \
3899 public: \
3900 CommandName(int32 InRetryCount, double InWaitTimeBetweenRuns, ParamType0 ParamName0, ParamType1 ParamName1) \
3901 : IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays(#CommandName, InRetryCount, InWaitTimeBetweenRuns) \
3902 , ParamName0(ParamName0) \
3903 , ParamName1(ParamName1) \
3904 {} \
3905 virtual ~CommandName() \
3906 {} \
3907 EXPORT_API virtual bool Execute() override; \
3908 private: \
3909 ParamType0 ParamName0; \
3910 ParamType1 ParamName1; \
3911}
3912
3913#define DEFINE_EXPORTED_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_WITH_RETRIES_THREE_PARAMETERS(EXPORT_API,CommandName,RetryCount,WaitTimeBetweenRuns,ParamType0,ParamName0,ParamType1,ParamName1,ParamType2,ParamName2) \
3914class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays \
3915 { \
3916 public: \
3917 CommandName(int32 InRetryCount, double InWaitTimeBetweenRuns, ParamType0 ParamName0, ParamType1 ParamName1, ParamType2 ParamName2) \
3918 : IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays(#CommandName, InRetryCount, InWaitTimeBetweenRuns) \
3919 , ParamName0(ParamName0) \
3920 , ParamName1(ParamName1) \
3921 , ParamName2(ParamName2) \
3922 {} \
3923 virtual ~CommandName() \
3924 {} \
3925 EXPORT_API virtual bool Execute() override; \
3926 private: \
3927 ParamType0 ParamName0; \
3928 ParamType1 ParamName1; \
3929 ParamType2 ParamName2; \
3930}
3931
3932#define DEFINE_EXPORTED_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND_WITH_RETRIES_FOUR_PARAMETERS(EXPORT_API,CommandName,RetryCount,WaitTimeBetweenRuns,ParamType0,ParamName0,ParamType1,ParamName1,ParamType2,ParamName2,ParamType3,ParamName3) \
3933class CommandName : public IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays \
3934 { \
3935 public: \
3936 CommandName(int32 InRetryCount, double InWaitTimeBetweenRuns, ParamType0 ParamName0, ParamType1 ParamName1, ParamType2 ParamName2, ParamType3 ParamName3) \
3937 : IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays(#CommandName, InRetryCount, InWaitTimeBetweenRuns) \
3938 , ParamName0(ParamName0) \
3939 , ParamName1(ParamName1) \
3940 , ParamName2(ParamName2) \
3941 , ParamName3(ParamName3) \
3942 {} \
3943 virtual ~CommandName() \
3944 {} \
3945 EXPORT_API virtual bool Execute() override; \
3946 private: \
3947 ParamType0 ParamName0; \
3948 ParamType1 ParamName1; \
3949 ParamType2 ParamName2; \
3950 ParamType3 ParamName3; \
3951}
3952
3953//macro to simply the syntax for enqueueing a latent command
3954#if WITH_AUTOMATION_TESTS
3955#define ADD_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND(ClassDeclaration) FAutomationTestFramework::Get().EnqueueLatentCommand(MakeShareable(new ClassDeclaration));
3956#else
3957#define ADD_LATENT_AUTOMATION_COMMAND(ClassDeclaration)
3958#endif
3959
3960//declare the class
3961#define START_NETWORK_AUTOMATION_COMMAND(ClassDeclaration) \
3962class F##ClassDeclaration : public IAutomationNetworkCommand \
3963{ \
3964private:\
3965 int32 RoleIndex; \
3966public: \
3967 F##ClassDeclaration(int32 InRoleIndex) : RoleIndex(InRoleIndex) {} \
3968 virtual ~F##ClassDeclaration() {} \
3969 virtual uint32 GetRoleIndex() const override { return RoleIndex; } \
3970 virtual void Run() override
3971
3972//close the class and add to the framework
3973#define END_NETWORK_AUTOMATION_COMMAND(ClassDeclaration,InRoleIndex) }; \
3974 FAutomationTestFramework::Get().EnqueueNetworkCommand(MakeShareable(new F##ClassDeclaration(InRoleIndex))); \
3975
3976
3988
3989#define IMPLEMENT_SIMPLE_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE( TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags, FileName, LineNumber ) \
3990 class TClass : public TBaseClass \
3991 { \
3992 public: \
3993 TClass( const FString& InName ) \
3994 :TBaseClass( InName, false ) {\
3995 static_assert(!!((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_ApplicationContextMask), "AutomationTest has no application flag. It shouldn't run. See AutomationTest.h."); \
3996 static_assert( !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::SmokeFilter) || \
3997 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::EngineFilter) || \
3998 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::ProductFilter) || \
3999 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::PerfFilter) || \
4000 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::StressFilter) || \
4001 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::NegativeFilter), \
4002 "All AutomationTests must have exactly 1 filter type specified. See AutomationTest.h."); \
4003 } \
4004 virtual EAutomationTestFlags GetTestFlags() const override { return TFlags; } \
4005 virtual bool IsStressTest() const { return false; } \
4006 virtual uint32 GetRequiredDeviceNum() const override { return 1; } \
4007 virtual FString GetTestSourceFileName() const override { return FileName; } \
4008 virtual int32 GetTestSourceFileLine() const override { return LineNumber; } \
4009 protected: \
4010 virtual void GetTests(TArray<FString>& OutBeautifiedNames, TArray <FString>& OutTestCommands) const override \
4011 { \
4012 OutBeautifiedNames.Add(PrettyName); \
4013 OutTestCommands.Add(FString()); \
4014 } \
4015 virtual bool RunTest(const FString& Parameters) override; \
4016 virtual FString GetBeautifiedTestName() const override { return PrettyName; } \
4017 };
4018
4019
4020
4021#define IMPLEMENT_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE( TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags, FileName, LineNumber ) \
4022 class TClass : public TBaseClass \
4023 { \
4024 public: \
4025 TClass( const FString& InName ) \
4026 :TBaseClass( InName, true ) { \
4027 static_assert(!!((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_ApplicationContextMask), "AutomationTest has no application flag. It shouldn't run. See AutomationTest.h."); \
4028 static_assert( !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::SmokeFilter) || \
4029 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::EngineFilter) || \
4030 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::ProductFilter) || \
4031 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::PerfFilter) || \
4032 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::StressFilter) || \
4033 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::NegativeFilter), \
4034 "All AutomationTests must have exactly 1 filter type specified. See AutomationTest.h."); \
4035 } \
4036 virtual EAutomationTestFlags GetTestFlags() const override { return ((TFlags) & ~(EAutomationTestFlags::SmokeFilter)); } \
4037 virtual bool IsStressTest() const { return true; } \
4038 virtual uint32 GetRequiredDeviceNum() const override { return 1; } \
4039 virtual FString GetTestSourceFileName() const override { return FileName; } \
4040 virtual int32 GetTestSourceFileLine() const override { return LineNumber; } \
4041 protected: \
4042 virtual void GetTests(TArray<FString>& OutBeautifiedNames, TArray <FString>& OutTestCommands) const override; \
4043 virtual bool RunTest(const FString& Parameters) override; \
4044 virtual FString GetBeautifiedTestName() const override { return PrettyName; } \
4045 };
4046
4047#define IMPLEMENT_NETWORKED_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags, NumParticipants, FileName, LineNumber) \
4048 class TClass : public TBaseClass \
4049 { \
4050 public: \
4051 TClass( const FString& InName ) \
4052 :TBaseClass( InName, false ) { \
4053 static_assert(!!((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_ApplicationContextMask), "AutomationTest has no application flag. It shouldn't run. See AutomationTest.h."); \
4054 static_assert( !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::SmokeFilter) || \
4055 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::EngineFilter) || \
4056 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::ProductFilter) || \
4057 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::PerfFilter) || \
4058 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::StressFilter) || \
4059 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::NegativeFilter), \
4060 "All AutomationTests must have exactly 1 filter type specified. See AutomationTest.h."); \
4061 } \
4062 virtual EAutomationTestFlags GetTestFlags() const override { return ((TFlags) & ~(EAutomationTestFlags::EditorContext | EAutomationTestFlags::CommandletContext | EAutomationTestFlags::SmokeFilter)); } \
4063 virtual uint32 GetRequiredDeviceNum() const override { return NumParticipants; } \
4064 virtual FString GetTestSourceFileName() const override { return FileName; } \
4065 virtual int32 GetTestSourceFileLine() const override { return LineNumber; } \
4066 protected: \
4067 virtual void GetTests(TArray<FString>& OutBeautifiedNames, TArray <FString>& OutTestCommands) const override \
4068 { \
4069 OutBeautifiedNames.Add(PrettyName); \
4070 OutTestCommands.Add(FString()); \
4071 } \
4072 virtual bool RunTest(const FString& Parameters) override; \
4073 virtual FString GetBeautifiedTestName() const override { return PrettyName; } \
4074 };
4075
4076#define IMPLEMENT_BDD_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE( TClass, PrettyName, TFlags, FileName, LineNumber ) \
4077 class TClass : public FBDDAutomationTestBase \
4078 { \
4079 public: \
4080 TClass( const FString& InName ) \
4081 :FBDDAutomationTestBase( InName, false ) {\
4082 static_assert(!!((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_ApplicationContextMask), "AutomationTest has no application flag. It shouldn't run. See AutomationTest.h."); \
4083 static_assert( !!((((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::SmokeFilter) || \
4084 !!((((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::EngineFilter) || \
4085 !!((((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::ProductFilter) || \
4086 !!((((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::PerfFilter) || \
4087 !!((((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::StressFilter) || \
4088 !!((((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::NegativeFilter), \
4089 "All AutomationTests must have exactly 1 filter type specified. See AutomationTest.h."); \
4090 } \
4091 virtual EAutomationTestFlags GetTestFlags() const override { return TFlags; } \
4092 virtual bool IsStressTest() const { return false; } \
4093 virtual uint32 GetRequiredDeviceNum() const override { return 1; } \
4094 virtual FString GetTestSourceFileName() const override { return FileName; } \
4095 virtual int32 GetTestSourceFileLine() const override { return LineNumber; } \
4096 protected: \
4097 virtual bool RunTest(const FString& Parameters) override; \
4098 virtual FString GetBeautifiedTestName() const override { return PrettyName; } \
4099 private: \
4100 void Define(); \
4101 };
4102
4103#define DEFINE_SPEC_PRIVATE( TClass, PrettyName, TFlags, FileName, LineNumber ) \
4104 class TClass : public FAutomationSpecBase \
4105 { \
4106 public: \
4107 TClass( const FString& InName ) \
4108 : FAutomationSpecBase( InName, false ) {\
4109 static_assert(!!((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_ApplicationContextMask), "AutomationTest has no application flag. It shouldn't run. See AutomationTest.h."); \
4110 static_assert( !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::SmokeFilter) || \
4111 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::EngineFilter) || \
4112 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::ProductFilter) || \
4113 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::PerfFilter) || \
4114 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::StressFilter) || \
4115 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::NegativeFilter), \
4116 "All AutomationTests must have exactly 1 filter type specified. See AutomationTest.h."); \
4117 } \
4118 virtual EAutomationTestFlags GetTestFlags() const override { return TFlags; } \
4119 using FAutomationSpecBase::GetTestSourceFileName; \
4120 virtual FString GetTestSourceFileName() const override { return FileName; } \
4121 using FAutomationSpecBase::GetTestSourceFileLine; \
4122 virtual int32 GetTestSourceFileLine() const override { return LineNumber; } \
4123 virtual FString GetTestSourceFileName(const FString&) const override { return GetTestSourceFileName(); } \
4124 virtual int32 GetTestSourceFileLine(const FString&) const override { return GetTestSourceFileLine(); } \
4125 protected: \
4126 virtual FString GetBeautifiedTestName() const override { return PrettyName; } \
4127 virtual void Define() override; \
4128 };
4129
4130#define BEGIN_DEFINE_SPEC_PRIVATE( TClass, PrettyName, TFlags, FileName, LineNumber ) \
4131 class TClass : public FAutomationSpecBase \
4132 { \
4133 public: \
4134 TClass( const FString& InName ) \
4135 : FAutomationSpecBase( InName, false ) {\
4136 static_assert(!!((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_ApplicationContextMask), "AutomationTest has no application flag. It shouldn't run. See AutomationTest.h."); \
4137 static_assert( !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::SmokeFilter) || \
4138 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::EngineFilter) || \
4139 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::ProductFilter) || \
4140 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::PerfFilter) || \
4141 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::StressFilter) || \
4142 !!(((TFlags) & EAutomationTestFlags_FilterMask) == EAutomationTestFlags::NegativeFilter), \
4143 "All AutomationTests must have exactly 1 filter type specified. See AutomationTest.h."); \
4144 } \
4145 virtual EAutomationTestFlags GetTestFlags() const override { return TFlags; } \
4146 using FAutomationSpecBase::GetTestSourceFileName; \
4147 virtual FString GetTestSourceFileName() const override { return FileName; } \
4148 using FAutomationSpecBase::GetTestSourceFileLine; \
4149 virtual int32 GetTestSourceFileLine() const override { return LineNumber; } \
4150 protected: \
4151 virtual FString GetBeautifiedTestName() const override { return PrettyName; } \
4152 virtual void Define() override;
4153
4154#define REGISTER_SIMPLE_AUTOMATION_TEST_TAGS( TClass, PrettyName, TagsString ) \
4155 namespace\
4156 {\
4157 FAutomationTestTags TClass##AutomationTagsInstance(PrettyName, TagsString);\
4158 }
4159
4160#if WITH_AUTOMATION_WORKER
4161 #define IMPLEMENT_SIMPLE_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4162 IMPLEMENT_SIMPLE_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, FAutomationTestBase, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__) \
4163 namespace\
4164 {\
4165 TClass TClass##AutomationTestInstance( TEXT(#TClass) );\
4166 }
4167 #define IMPLEMENT_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4168 IMPLEMENT_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, FAutomationTestBase, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__) \
4169 namespace\
4170 {\
4171 TClass TClass##AutomationTestInstance( TEXT(#TClass) );\
4172 }
4173 #define IMPLEMENT_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_CLASS( TClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4174 IMPLEMENT_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, FAutomationTestBase, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4175 #define IMPLEMENT_NETWORKED_AUTOMATION_TEST(TClass, PrettyName, TFlags, NumParticipants) \
4176 IMPLEMENT_NETWORKED_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, FAutomationTestBase, PrettyName, TFlags, NumParticipants, __FILE__, __LINE__) \
4177 namespace\
4178 {\
4179 TClass TClass##AutomationTestInstance( TEXT(#TClass) );\
4180 }
4181
4182 #define IMPLEMENT_CUSTOM_SIMPLE_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4183 IMPLEMENT_SIMPLE_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__) \
4184 namespace\
4185 {\
4186 TClass TClass##AutomationTestInstance( TEXT(#TClass) );\
4187 }
4188
4189 #define IMPLEMENT_CUSTOM_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4190 IMPLEMENT_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__) \
4191 namespace\
4192 {\
4193 TClass TClass##AutomationTestInstance( TEXT(#TClass) );\
4194 }
4195
4196 #define IMPLEMENT_BDD_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4197 IMPLEMENT_BDD_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__) \
4198 namespace\
4199 {\
4200 TClass TClass##AutomationTestInstance( TEXT(#TClass) );\
4201 }
4202
4203 #define DEFINE_SPEC( TClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4204 DEFINE_SPEC_PRIVATE(TClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__) \
4205 namespace\
4206 {\
4207 TClass TClass##AutomationSpecInstance( TEXT(#TClass) );\
4208 }
4209
4210 #define BEGIN_DEFINE_SPEC( TClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4211 BEGIN_DEFINE_SPEC_PRIVATE(TClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4212
4213 #define END_DEFINE_SPEC( TClass ) \
4214 };\
4215 namespace\
4216 {\
4217 TClass TClass##AutomationSpecInstance( TEXT(#TClass) );\
4218 }
4219
4220 //#define BEGIN_CUSTOM_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4221 // BEGIN_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4222 //
4223 //#define END_CUSTOM_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass ) \
4224 // BEGIN_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4225 // namespace\
4226 // {\
4227 // TClass TClass##AutomationTestInstance( TEXT(#TClass) );\
4228 // }
4229
4230#else
4231 #define IMPLEMENT_SIMPLE_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4232 IMPLEMENT_SIMPLE_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, FAutomationTestBase, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4233 #define IMPLEMENT_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4234 IMPLEMENT_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, FAutomationTestBase, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4235 #define IMPLEMENT_NETWORKED_AUTOMATION_TEST(TClass, PrettyName, TFlags, NumParticipants) \
4236 IMPLEMENT_NETWORKED_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, FAutomationTestBase, PrettyName, TFlags, NumParticipants, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4237
4238 #define IMPLEMENT_CUSTOM_SIMPLE_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4239 IMPLEMENT_SIMPLE_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4240 #define IMPLEMENT_CUSTOM_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4241 IMPLEMENT_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4242 #define IMPLEMENT_BDD_AUTOMATION_TEST(TClass, PrettyName, TFlags) \
4243 IMPLEMENT_BDD_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4244 #define DEFINE_SPEC(TClass, PrettyName, TFlags) \
4245 DEFINE_SPEC_PRIVATE(TClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4246 #define BEGIN_DEFINE_SPEC(TClass, PrettyName, TFlags) \
4247 BEGIN_DEFINE_SPEC_PRIVATE(TClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4248 #define END_DEFINE_SPEC(TClass) \
4249 }; \
4250
4251 //#define BEGIN_CUSTOM_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags ) \
4252 // BEGIN_CUSTOM_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4253
4254 //#define END_CUSTOM_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST( TClass )
4255 // END_COMPLEX_AUTOMATION_TEST_PRIVATE(TClass, TBaseClass, PrettyName, TFlags, __FILE__, __LINE__)
4256#endif // #if WITH_AUTOMATION_WORKER
4257
4258
4280
4281#define UTEST_EQUAL(What, Actual, Expected)\
4282 if (!TestEqual(What, Actual, Expected))\
4283 {\
4284 return false;\
4285 }
4286
4287#define UTEST_EQUAL_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4288 if (!TestEqual(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected))\
4289 {\
4290 return false;\
4291 }
4292
4293#define UTEST_EQUAL_TOLERANCE(What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance)\
4294 if (!TestEqual(What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance))\
4295 {\
4296 return false;\
4297 }
4298
4299#define UTEST_EQUAL_TOLERANCE_EXPR(Actual, Expected, Tolerance)\
4300 if (!TestEqual(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected, Tolerance))\
4301 {\
4302 return false;\
4303 }
4304
4305#define UTEST_NEARLY_EQUAL(What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance)\
4306 if (!TestNearlyEqual(What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance))\
4307 {\
4308 return false;\
4309 }
4310
4311#define UTEST_NEARLY_EQUAL_EXPR(Actual, Expected, Tolerance)\
4312 if (!TestNearlyEqual(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected, Tolerance))\
4313 {\
4314 return false;\
4315 }
4316
4317#define UTEST_EQUAL_INSENSITIVE(What, Actual, Expected)\
4318 if (!TestEqual(What, Actual, Expected))\
4319 {\
4320 return false;\
4321 }
4322
4323#define UTEST_EQUAL_INSENSITIVE_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4324 if (!TestEqual(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected))\
4325 {\
4326 return false;\
4327 }
4328
4329#define UTEST_NOT_EQUAL_INSENSITIVE(What, Actual, Expected)\
4330 if (!TestNotEqual(What, Actual, Expected))\
4331 {\
4332 return false;\
4333 }
4334
4335#define UTEST_NOT_EQUAL_INSENSITIVE_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4336 if (!TestNotEqual(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected))\
4337 {\
4338 return false;\
4339 }
4340
4341#define UTEST_EQUAL_SENSITIVE(What, Actual, Expected)\
4342 if (!TestEqualSensitive(What, Actual, Expected))\
4343 {\
4344 return false;\
4345 }
4346
4347#define UTEST_EQUAL_SENSITIVE_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4348 if (!TestEqualSensitive(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected))\
4349 {\
4350 return false;\
4351 }
4352
4353#define UTEST_NOT_EQUAL_SENSITIVE(What, Actual, Expected)\
4354 if (!TestNotEqualSensitive(What, Actual, Expected))\
4355 {\
4356 return false;\
4357 }
4358
4359#define UTEST_NOT_EQUAL_SENSITIVE_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4360 if (!TestNotEqualSensitive(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected))\
4361 {\
4362 return false;\
4363 }
4364
4365#define UTEST_NOT_EQUAL(What, Actual, Expected)\
4366 if (!TestNotEqual(What, Actual, Expected))\
4367 {\
4368 return false;\
4369 }
4370
4371#define UTEST_NOT_EQUAL_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4372 if (!TestNotEqual(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s != %s"), TEXT(#Actual), TEXT(#Expected)), Actual, Expected))\
4373 {\
4374 return false;\
4375 }
4376
4377#define UTEST_LESS(What, Actual, Expected)\
4378 if (!TestLessThan(What, Actual, Expected))\
4379 {\
4380 return false;\
4381 }
4382
4383#define UTEST_LESS_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4384 if (!TestLessThan(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected))\
4385 {\
4386 return false;\
4387 }
4388
4389#define UTEST_LESS_TOLERANCE(What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance)\
4390 if (!TestLessThan(What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance))\
4391 {\
4392 return false;\
4393 }
4394
4395#define UTEST_LESS_TOLERANCE_EXPR(Actual, Expected, Tolerance)\
4396 if (!TestLessThan(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected, Tolerance))\
4397 {\
4398 return false;\
4399 }
4400
4401#define UTEST_GREATER(What, Actual, Expected)\
4402 if (!TestGreaterThan(What, Actual, Expected))\
4403 {\
4404 return false;\
4405 }
4406
4407#define UTEST_GREATER_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4408 if (!TestGreaterThan(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected))\
4409 {\
4410 return false;\
4411 }
4412
4413#define UTEST_GREATER_TOLERANCE(What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance)\
4414 if (!TestGreaterThan(What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance))\
4415 {\
4416 return false;\
4417 }
4418
4419#define UTEST_GREATER_TOLERANCE_EXPR(Actual, Expected, Tolerance)\
4420 if (!TestGreaterThan(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected, Tolerance))\
4421 {\
4422 return false;\
4423 }
4424
4425#define UTEST_LESS_EQUAL(What, Actual, Expected)\
4426 if (!TestLessEqual(What, Actual, Expected))\
4427 {\
4428 return false;\
4429 }
4430
4431#define UTEST_LESS_EQUAL_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4432 if (!TestLessEqual(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected))\
4433 {\
4434 return false;\
4435 }
4436
4437#define UTEST_LESS_EQUAL_TOLERANCE(What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance)\
4438 if (!TestLessEqual(What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance))\
4439 {\
4440 return false;\
4441 }
4442
4443#define UTEST_LESS_EQUAL_TOLERANCE_EXPR(Actual, Expected, Tolerance)\
4444 if (!TestLessEqual(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected, Tolerance))\
4445 {\
4446 return false;\
4447 }
4448
4449#define UTEST_GREATER_EQUAL(What, Actual, Expected)\
4450 if (!TestGreaterEqual(What, Actual, Expected))\
4451 {\
4452 return false;\
4453 }
4454
4455#define UTEST_GREATER_EQUAL_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4456 if (!TestGreaterEqual(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected))\
4457 {\
4458 return false;\
4459 }
4460
4461#define UTEST_GREATER_EQUAL_TOLERANCE(What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance)\
4462 if (!TestGreaterEqual(What, Actual, Expected, Tolerance))\
4463 {\
4464 return false;\
4465 }
4466
4467#define UTEST_GREATER_EQUAL_TOLERANCE_EXPR(Actual, Expected, Tolerance)\
4468 if (!TestGreaterEqual(TEXT(#Actual), Actual, Expected, Tolerance))\
4469 {\
4470 return false;\
4471 }
4472
4473#define UTEST_SAME(What, Actual, Expected)\
4474 if (!TestSame(What, Actual, Expected))\
4475 {\
4476 return false;\
4477 }
4478
4479#define UTEST_SAME_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4480 if (!TestSame(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s == %s"), TEXT(#Actual), TEXT(#Expected)), Actual, Expected))\
4481 {\
4482 return false;\
4483 }
4484
4485#define UTEST_NOT_SAME(What, Actual, Expected)\
4486 if (!TestNotSame(What, Actual, Expected))\
4487 {\
4488 return false;\
4489 }
4490
4491#define UTEST_NOT_SAME_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4492 if (!TestNotSame(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s != %s"), TEXT(#Actual), TEXT(#Expected)), Actual, Expected))\
4493 {\
4494 return false;\
4495 }
4496
4497#define UTEST_SAME_PTR(What, Actual, Expected)\
4498 if (!TestSamePtr(What, Actual, Expected))\
4499 {\
4500 return false;\
4501 }
4502
4503#define UTEST_SAME_PTR_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4504 if (!TestSamePtr(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s == %s"), TEXT(#Actual), TEXT(#Expected)), Actual, Expected))\
4505 {\
4506 return false;\
4507 }
4508
4509#define UTEST_NOT_SAME_PTR(What, Actual, Expected)\
4510 if (!TestNotSamePtr(What, Actual, Expected))\
4511 {\
4512 return false;\
4513 }
4514
4515#define UTEST_NOT_SAME_PTR_EXPR(Actual, Expected)\
4516 if (!TestNotSamePtr(FString::Printf(TEXT("%s != %s"), TEXT(#Actual), TEXT(#Expected)), Actual, Expected))\
4517 {\
4518 return false;\
4519 }
4520
4521#define UTEST_TRUE(What, Value)\
4522 if (!TestTrue(What, Value))\
4523 {\
4524 return false;\
4525 }
4526
4527#define UTEST_TRUE_EXPR(Expression)\
4528 if (!TestTrue(TEXT(#Expression), Expression))\
4529 {\
4530 return false;\
4531 }
4532
4533#define UTEST_FALSE(What, Value)\
4534 if (!TestFalse(What, Value))\
4535 {\
4536 return false;\
4537 }
4538
4539#define UTEST_FALSE_EXPR(Expression)\
4540 if (!TestFalse(TEXT(#Expression), Expression))\
4541 {\
4542 return false;\
4543 }
4544
4545#define UTEST_VALID(What, Value)\
4546 if (!TestValid(What, Value))\
4547 {\
4548 return false;\
4549 }
4550
4551#define UTEST_VALID_EXPR(Value)\
4552 if (!TestValid(TEXT(#Value), Value))\
4553 {\
4554 return false;\
4555 }
4556
4557#define UTEST_INVALID(What, Value)\
4558 if (!TestInvalid(What, Value))\
4559 {\
4560 return false;\
4561 }
4562
4563#define UTEST_INVALID_EXPR(Value)\
4564 if (!TestInvalid(TEXT(#Value), Value))\
4565 {\
4566 return false;\
4567 }
4568
4569#define UTEST_NULL(What, Pointer)\
4570 if (!TestNull(What, Pointer))\
4571 {\
4572 return false;\
4573 }
4574
4575#define UTEST_NULL_EXPR(Pointer)\
4576 if (!TestNull(TEXT(#Pointer), Pointer))\
4577 {\
4578 return false;\
4579 }
4580
4581#define UTEST_NOT_NULL(What, Pointer)\
4582 if (!TestNotNull(What, Pointer))\
4583 {\
4584 return false;\
4585 }\
4586 CA_ASSUME(Pointer);
4587
4588#define UTEST_NOT_NULL_EXPR(Pointer)\
4589 if (!TestNotNull(TEXT(#Pointer), Pointer))\
4590 {\
4591 return false;\
4592 }\
4593 CA_ASSUME(Pointer);
4594
4596// Basic Latent Commands
4597
4602class FFunctionLatentCommand : public IAutomationLatentCommand
4603{
4604public:
4605 FFunctionLatentCommand(TFunction<bool()> InLatentPredicate)
4606 : LatentPredicate(MoveTemp(InLatentPredicate))
4607 {
4608 }
4609
4610 virtual ~FFunctionLatentCommand()
4611 {
4612 }
4613
4614 virtual bool Update() override
4615 {
4616 return LatentPredicate();
4617 }
4618
4619private:
4620 TFunction<bool()> LatentPredicate;
4621};
4622
4623
4624class FDelayedFunctionLatentCommand : public IAutomationLatentCommand
4625{
4626public:
4627 FDelayedFunctionLatentCommand(TFunction<void()> InCallback, float InDelay = 0.1f)
4628 : Callback(MoveTemp(InCallback))
4629 , Delay(InDelay)
4630 {}
4631
4632 virtual bool Update() override
4633 {
4634 double NewTime = FPlatformTime::Seconds();
4635 if ( NewTime - StartTime >= Delay )
4636 {
4637 Callback();
4638 return true;
4639 }
4640 return false;
4641 }
4642
4643private:
4644 TFunction<void()> Callback;
4645 float Delay;
4646};
4647
4648
4649class FUntilCommand : public IAutomationLatentCommand
4650{
4651public:
4652 FUntilCommand(TFunction<bool()> InCallback, TFunction<bool()> InTimeoutCallback, float InTimeout = 5.0f)
4653 : Callback(MoveTemp(InCallback))
4654 , TimeoutCallback(MoveTemp(InTimeoutCallback))
4655 , Timeout(InTimeout)
4656 {}
4657
4658 virtual bool Update() override
4659 {
4660 if ( !Callback() )
4661 {
4662 const double NewTime = FPlatformTime::Seconds();
4663 if ( NewTime - StartTime >= Timeout )
4664 {
4665 TimeoutCallback();
4666 return true;
4667 }
4668
4669 return false;
4670 }
4671
4672 return true;
4673 }
4674
4675private:
4676 TFunction<bool()> Callback;
4677 TFunction<bool()> TimeoutCallback;
4678 float Timeout;
4679};
4680
4681// Extension of IAutomationLatentCommand with delays between attempts
4682// if initial command does not succeed. Has a max retry count that can be
4683// overridden. Default is 10 retries with a 1 second delay in between.
4684// To protect against misuse of unlimited retries, has a Max execution
4685// time of 5 minutes. This can be overridden, but not recommended. Only
4686// do this if you're absolutely certain it will not cause an infinite loop
4687class IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays : public IAutomationLatentCommand
4688{
4689public:
4690 virtual ~IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays() {}
4691
4692 virtual void CommandFailedDueToError(const FString& ErrorMessage)
4693 {
4694 // Stop further commands and log error so the test fails.
4695 FAutomationTestFramework::Get().DequeueAllCommands();
4696 // Must log here so that Gauntlet can also pick up the error for its report. Otherwise, it will only show up in the Automation log.
4697 UE_LOG(LogLatentCommands, Error, TEXT("%s"), *ErrorMessage);
4698 GetCurrentTest()->AddError(ErrorMessage);
4699 }
4700
4701 // Base Update override with delay logic built in. Can be further overridden in child
4702 // classes
4703 virtual bool Update() override
4704 {
4705 if (bHasUnlimitedRetries)
4706 {
4707 // command has unlimited retries, so need to check if max run time has been exceeded
4708 if (HasExceededMaxTotalRunTime())
4709 {
4710 // Command run time has exceeded max total run time.
4711 FString ErrorMessageText = FString::Printf(
4712 TEXT("%s has failed due to exceeding the max allowed run time of %f seconds. ")
4713 TEXT("This may be due to an error, or having a single command attempt to do ")
4714 TEXT("too many things. If this is not due to an error, consider breaking ")
4715 TEXT("up this command into multiple, smaller commands."), *GetTestAndCommandName(), MaxTotalRunTimeInSeconds);
4716 CommandFailedDueToError(ErrorMessageText);
4717 return true;
4718 }
4719 }
4720
4721 if (IsDelayTimerRunning())
4722 {
4723 return false;
4724 }
4725
4726 // pre-increment iteration so that its 1 based instead of 0 based for readability
4727 CurrentIteration++;
4728
4729 if (!CanRetry())
4730 {
4731 // Must log here so that Gauntlet can also pick up the error for its report. Otherwise, it will only show up in the Automation log.
4732 FString ErrorMessageText = FString::Printf(TEXT("%s Latent command with retries and delays has failed after %d retries"), *GetTestAndCommandName(), MaxRetries);
4733 CommandFailedDueToError(ErrorMessageText);
4734 return true;
4735 }
4736
4737 ResetDelayTimer();
4738
4739 // auto-logging for limited retries and unlimited retries
4740 if (bHasUnlimitedRetries)
4741 {
4742 UE_LOG(LogLatentCommands, Log, TEXT("%s Executing Attempt %d."), *GetTestAndCommandName(), CurrentIteration);
4743 }
4744 else
4745 {
4746 UE_LOG(LogLatentCommands, Log, TEXT("%s Executing Attempt %d of %d."), *GetTestAndCommandName(), CurrentIteration, MaxRetries);
4747 }
4748
4749 if (Execute())
4750 {
4751 // completion log message, logs total time taken.
4752 UE_LOG(LogLatentCommands, Log, TEXT("%s Completed Successfully, total run time: %f seconds."), *GetTestAndCommandName(), GetCurrentRunTime());
4753
4754 return true;
4755 }
4756
4757 return false;
4758 }
4759
4760 // Pure virtual method that must be overridden.
4761 // This is the actual command logic.
4762 virtual bool Execute() = 0;
4763
4764private:
4765 // To keep track of which iteration we are on. 1 based
4766 // To allow for more readable logs. Attempt 1 of N instead
4767 // of 0 of N.
4768 int32 CurrentIteration = 0;
4769
4770protected:
4771 // default constructor
4772 IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays() {}
4773
4774 // parameterized constructor
4775 IAutomationLatentCommandWithRetriesAndDelays(const FString InCommandClassName, const int32 InMaxRetries, const double InWaitTimeBetweenRuns)
4776 :CommandClassName(InCommandClassName)
4777 , MaxRetries(InMaxRetries < 0 ? 0 : InMaxRetries)
4778 , bHasUnlimitedRetries(InMaxRetries == 0)
4779 , DelayTimeInSeconds(InWaitTimeBetweenRuns)
4780 {
4781 // set first run start time so that we don't start off in a delay. Its fine if its negative.
4782 DelayStartTime = FPlatformTime::Seconds() - InWaitTimeBetweenRuns;
4783
4784 // warn if command has unlimited retries MaxTotalRunTime
4785 if (bHasUnlimitedRetries)
4786 {
4787 // Must log here so that Gauntlet can also pick up the error for its report. Otherwise, it will only show up in the Automation log.
4788 UE_LOG(LogLatentCommands, Warning,
4789 TEXT("%s has been set to Unlimited retries. Will be using MaxTotalRunTime to prevent ")
4790 TEXT("running forever. Default time is set at 300 seconds. If this is not enough time, ")
4791 TEXT("make sure to override this in your Execute() loop."), *GetTestAndCommandName());
4792 }
4793 }
4794
4795 // Resets the Delay Timer by setting start time to now (In game time).
4796 void ResetDelayTimer()
4797 {
4798 DelayStartTime = FPlatformTime::Seconds();
4799 }
4800
4801 // Determines if timer is running, pausing execution in a non-blocking way.
4802 bool IsDelayTimerRunning() const
4803 {
4804 // time elapsed < Delay time
4805 return (FPlatformTime::Seconds() - DelayStartTime) < DelayTimeInSeconds;
4806 }
4807
4808 // Returns if we have exceeded max allowed total run time for this latent command
4809 bool HasExceededMaxTotalRunTime()
4810 {
4811 return MaxTotalRunTimeInSeconds - GetCurrentRunTime() < 0;
4812 }
4813
4814 // Determines if we should execute the command. If MaxRetries is set to 0,
4815 // indicates unlimited retries.
4816 bool CanRetry() const
4817 {
4818 return (CurrentIteration <= MaxRetries) || MaxRetries == 0;
4819 }
4820
4821 // Returns the command name
4822 FString GetTestAndCommandName() const
4823 {
4824 // Otherwise use the provided string
4825 return FString::Printf(TEXT("Test: %s - Command: %s - "), *GetCurrentTest()->GetTestFullName(), *CommandClassName);
4826 }
4827
4828 FAutomationTestBase* GetCurrentTest() const
4829 {
4830 return FAutomationTestFramework::Get().GetCurrentTest();
4831 }
4832
4833 void OverrideMaxTotalRunTimeInSeconds(double OverrideValue)
4834 {
4835 MaxTotalRunTimeInSeconds = OverrideValue;
4836 }
4837
4838 // Command Name stored for easy logging
4839 const FString CommandClassName = "UnknownCommand";
4840
4841 // Times to retry command before reporting command failure.
4842 // Defaults to 10, but can be overridden.
4843 const int32 MaxRetries = 10;
4844
4845 // Indicates that this latent command has unlimited retries
4846 // Used to implement the MaxTotalRunTimeInSeconds logic
4847 const bool bHasUnlimitedRetries = false;
4848
4849 // Time in between UpdateDelayed calls.
4850 // Default is 1 second but can be overridden.
4851 const double DelayTimeInSeconds = 1.0;
4852
4853 // Time that the Delay Timer started.
4854 double DelayStartTime = 0.0;
4855
4856private:
4857 // Max total run time for command
4858 // Default is 5 minutes, but can be overridden
4859 double MaxTotalRunTimeInSeconds = 300.0;
4860
4861};
4862
4863#if UE_ENABLE_INCLUDE_ORDER_DEPRECATED_IN_5_6
4864# include "TextFilterExpressionEvaluator.h"
4865#endif
